turns.text: Not much is new other than the screenplay. Been working on some projects and testing out dairy-free dessert recipes for friends and fam. Here's a pic of a cake I made recently! [image: a photo of a cake with white frosting on a wooden table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cake with white frosting on a wooden table

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That looks really good! I love the way the frosting turned out!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks! It's dairy-free vanilla with strawberry filling and coconut cream frosting. I gotta say, I really like your coconut reccomendation you gave a while back!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, Joanna, that looks amazing! I bet it tastes great - you're so talented at making dairy-free desserts!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! I really appreciate it. I love experimenting in the kitchen, coming up with something tasty. Cooking and baking are my creative outlets. Especially when I'm snackin' dairy-free, trying to make the desserts just as delicious - it's a rewarding challenge! Seeing the smiles on everyone's faces when they try it - it's a total win!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's great, Joanna! It must be so rewarding to see everyone enjoying your creations. Keep up the good work!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate all the help. Gonna keep trying new things. See ya later!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Bye!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you! Quite a week since we last talked - something awesome happened to me!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Jo! Great hearing from you! What happened?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I went hiking and found some more amazing trails in my town. It was such an awesome experience! I think I am an expert hiker now.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds great, Jo! Happy you had an awesome experience. Did you happen to take any photos of it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, I did! Loved this spot on the hike. The rush of the water was so soothing. [image: a photo of a waterfall with a dark sky in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a waterfall with a dark sky in the background

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, looks great! Where did you take this picture? I love the dark sky and green scenery.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks! I took this photo at a beautiful location called Whispering Falls. It was really peaceful and serene.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I wish I could have been there! Your hikes sound like a blast.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: It was awesome, Nate. The sound of that place and the beauty of nature made me so calm and peaceful. Everything else faded away and all that mattered was the present.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's great. Glad you found a spot that calms you down - nature sure can be a break from the craziness.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nature totally inspires me and it's so calming to be surrounded by its beauty. Hiking has opened up a whole new world for me and I feel like a different person now.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, Jo, that's really cool! It's great to have something that gets those creative juices flowing.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I always feel like I could write a whole movie when I'm out there in cool places like that!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow! That's really cool that it inspires you that much! For me I just get deep in thought and think about my life or new recipes.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I think about my life too sometimes when I'm out and about, but there was something special about these trails that made me feel like writing a drama.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey, we should go together sometime, don't you think? Maybe I'll start to think of a drama myself and publish my own screenplay.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Haha, now that would be something! Sure, you should come down and join me on the trails sometime!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds like a plan! Thanks for the invite Joanna!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sure thing Nate! See you later!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: See ya!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! How've you been? Been a busy week since we talked.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Just finished something - pretty wild journey!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Way to go! I just got a new addition to the family, this is Max! [image: a photo of a dog laying on a couch in a living room]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on a couch in a living room

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, he's adorable! How long have you had him? I can see why you're thrilled!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! It's awesome - he's adopted and so full of energy, and he's filling my life with so much joy. He's even keeping my other pets active.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Pets sure do make life better! Glad Max is bringing you lots of joy.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yep, totally! Pets make us so much happier and never let us down. Have you thought any more of getting one of your own?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Unfortunately, allergies make it so I don't really want to get any, and I'm too lazy to research alternative pets for my allergies.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Aww, that's unfortunate. It's nice seeing the joy pets bring to others, though. How do you find comfort when you don't have any?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Writing and creative projects are what get me through tough times. I'm also grateful for my supportive friends.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, that's awesome! Those both can definitely be therapeutic. It's great to have such positive relationships that make such a great impact.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah. It's so nice to have friends who understand and appreciate my work - it's priceless being able to talk about it together and receive feedback. Here's a look at what I've been working on – it's been quite a journey, but I made it! [image: a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, that looks great Joanna! Is that your third one?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yep! I chose to write about this because it's really personal. It's about loss, identity, and connection. It's a story I've had for ages but just got the guts to write it. It was hard, but I'm so proud of it.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That sounds impressive. You really do like writing about sadness and loss don't you.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Yeah I really do. I had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics. But I think meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings. It was scary, but I found that I write best when I'm being true to myself - even if it's hard.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Well done, Joanna! It takes guts to explore your experiences and feelings. I'm proud of you for staying strong and being true to yourself. Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Your support really means a lot. Knowing I've got people like you cheering me on makes this journey way easier.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No worries, Joanna! Keep going and reach for your dreams. You've got tons of talent and potential!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Jo! Been ages since we last talked. Here's something cool that happened the other day - I took Max for a walk and ran into this super nice couple who had a dog. It turns out they live close by. We decided to do doggy playdates, which is awesome considering we all need friends for our pets.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you. Sounds like a nice encounter on your walk. Connecting with others who have pets can be uplifting and rewarding.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: It's like fate. Having a walking buddy forMax will be great. He really likes the other dog too!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Awesome! Did you get to know the couple very well? What were they like?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: They actually didn't share a whole lot in common with me besides the love of animals, but I think that was all we needed to share in common to be good friends!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's really cool that you can just go out and meet people like that, keep it up Nate!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! I just really enjoy watching our pets play with one another. Its like a dream come true seeing my dog so happy.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I can see why having a peaceful presence around could help relieve stress. Having someone or something to come home to for a sense of calm would be helpful for relaxation.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yep, Joanna. It's great! Looky here, I got this new pup for you! [image: a photo of a stuffed animal laying on a bed]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a stuffed animal laying on a bed

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Awww! It's so cute! I love the thought Nate!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! It's a stuffed animal to remind you of the good vibes.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's so sweet! I'll cherish that little guy with all my heart!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah! It's like having joy in your pocket. It always makes me grin when I look at it.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's great, Nate! Appreciate the small joys like that cute stuffed animal. It's a nice reminder!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Agreed, those little things sure do make life better!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'll always remember those moments that bring us happiness and remind us that life is great!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sure, Joanna! It's all about finding those little things and cherishing them, otherwise it's easy to get down!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thinking back to the tough times finishing my screenplay made me realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, those little moments make it all worth it, especially during tough times. Enjoying the ride is key.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer! It keeps us focused on our dreams. Can't wait to show it to you. I value your opinion!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Can't wait to see it, Joanna! I'm here to support you.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Your support is greatly appreciated. I'll make sure to keep you updated.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nate, after finishing my screenplay I got a rejection letter from a major company. It really bummed me out.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sorry to hear that, Joanna. Rejection stinks, but it doesn't mean you're not talented. Don't give up on your dreams!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate. It can feel like a step back sometimes. But I appreciate your kind words and encouragement.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sure, just make sure you keep going and believing in yourself. Did something happen with the company?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: They just sent me a generic rejection letter without much feedback. It's disheartening not knowing why it didn't work out.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Ugh, that's so frustrating. But don't get discouraged, just keep going.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, you're right. I won't let this bring me down. Thanks for your support. What have you been up to lately?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I've been doing great - I just won another regional video game tournament last week! It was so cool, plus I met some new people. Connecting with fellow gamers is always awesome.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Way to go, Nate! Congratulations on your victory in the tournament! It must feel great to be recognized for your gaming skills.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! Winning was a huge confidence boost and shows my hard work paid off. I'm really happy with my progress.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I am as well! It's great to hear from you about your tournaments throughout the years!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! I has been a while since my first tournament hasn't it? I appreciate your support!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Anytime Nate! I'm here for you every step of the way.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I talked to some of the guys at the tournament afterwards, and they said they wanted to hang out later!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a purple and blue controller with a star field design

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sounds like fun! It's good to have friends that share your interests!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: For sure! They asked for some tips in how to improve their game, so I said I could help.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Good on you for helping strangers out! Stepping outside your comfort zone is always great.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, I just like helping people. Do you have any plans for the weekend?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yep, I'm hiking with some buddies this weekend. We're checking out a new trail with a rad waterfall. Can't wait! Do you have any fun plans?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds great! Have fun with that. I'm organizing a gaming party two weekends later - it'll be hectic but fun!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Oh? Are you going to invite your tournament friends?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Definitely! And some old friends and teamates from other tournaments.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sounds like fun, Nate! I wish you the best on your party. Have a blast!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! I'm sure it'll be a blast. I'm even getting everyone custom controller decorations just for coming!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, I bet they'll love that! What a sweet idea.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I know right? Have a great hike. Take lots of pics! See ya later!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! See you later!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Yesterday was crazy cool - I wrote a few bits for a screenplay that appeared on the big screen yesterday! It was nerve-wracking but so inspiring to see my words come alive!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a spider - man poster hanging on a wall

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Congrats, Joanna! Seeing your hard work pay off like that must've felt amazing. I bet it was scary too, but awesome! You're so inspiring. By the way, last time we saw eachother, I noticed a spiderman pin on your purse. Is Spider-Man your favorite superhero, or do you have another fave?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! It was a real roller coaster, but seeing the hard work pay off was amazing. Spider-Man has always been a favorite of mine - I mean, who doesn't love Peter Parker's struggles between being a hero and being a person? But I'm kind of a sucker for any superhero - everyone has their own rad story and powers. Do you have a favorite superhero?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's great, Joanna! Iron Man is my top pick. I love his tech and that sarcastic humor. Seeing these figures just makes me feel invincible! [image: a photography of a toy iron man standing on a white surface]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a toy iron man standing on a white surface

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, Nate! That's awesome. I love the tech and funny jokes of Iron Man too. What made you get that figure?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! I got it because it reminded me of something I love. Its presence in my room is a good reminder to keep working on my goals. Any inspiring things in your room?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: My cork board is full of inspiring quotes and pictures for motivation and creativity. It's my little corner of inspiration.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Joanna, that sounds great! Could you show me a picture of it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Here ya go, a pic of my cork board. It's got quotes, photos, and little keepsakes. [image: a photo of a picture frame with a picture of a family]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a picture frame with a picture of a family

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's a great pic of your family! What made you hang it on your cork board?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Having that picture on my cork board reminds me of the love and encouragement from them every day.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's great, Joanna. Family support is invaluable. It's so good to have those reminders.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Absolutely, it means a lot and keeps me going.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I really should start a cork board of my own shouldn't I. That seems like a really valuable thing!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I would definitely recommend it! As long as your willing to explain what it is to your friends.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Of course! Well see you later Joanna!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Bye Nate!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, long time no see! How have you been? I just got done submitting my recent screenplay to a film contest just to see how others might like it!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's really cool Joanna! I hope it does well, and I've been doing great! The gaming party was a great success! We even played some Chess afterward just for fun.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nice! Did your friends like the controller accessories?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Most of them did! I can't say if all of them will continue to use them or not, but that's beside the point.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah Nate, you're right. It doesn't matter if they use it, its the thought that matters right?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Absolutely! There were 7 people that attended, and 6 of them said they'd want to do it again next month!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That sounds like a huge success then! Congrats!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! On another note, I made vegan ice cream last Friday and shared it with some people in my vegan diet group. It was awesome! [image: a photography of a group of people sitting on a bench]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a group of people sitting on a bench

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Mm, yum! Can you give me the recipe for that? It sounds like it'd be a good recipe!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sure thing! I can give it to you tomorrow, how does that sound?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Awesome! I'm going to make it for my family this weekend - can't wait!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Nice one, Joanna! Hope you and your family like it. Let me know how it went!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sure thing! They love it when I make them new things!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Then I have no doubt they'll love the icecream!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! Your support is greatly appreciated. I'll make sure to keep you updated.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Can't wait to hear about it. Have a great day! Take care.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, check this out! I won my fourth video game tournament on Friday! It was awesome competing and showing off my skills - and the victory was indescribable. I'm really proud that I can make money doing what I love. This one was online! [image: a photo of a television screen showing a trophy and a trophy]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a television screen showing a trophy and a trophy

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Congrats, Nate! That's awesome! So proud of you. Your hard work really paid off - keep it up! BTW, I took a road trip for research for my next movie while you were winning. Much-needed break and a chance to explore new places and get inspired.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! Your support means a lot to me. That road trip sounds great! Where did you go? Did you discover any interesting places?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! Appreciate your kind words. I went to Woodhaven, a small town in the Midwest. Got to see some lovely scenery and historic buildings. Checked out the library there, it had a cool old book collection! [image: a photography of a book shelf filled with lots of books]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a book shelf filled with lots of books

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That place looks interesting! Did you find any cool books there?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I stumbled upon this super cool book from the 1900s with stories and sketches - so awesome to read about the town and the people living there! [image: a photo of a book with writing on it and a pen]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book with writing on it and a pen

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That sounds really interesting! Anyting specific stick out to you about it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Woodhaven has had an interesting past with lots of cool people. Seeing how much it changed sparked ideas for my next script.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Real-life stories are the best for inspiration. Can't wait to hear about your next one. Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! I'm stoked about this new script. It's different from my previous work, but it has the potential to be something awesome! I'll be sure to keep you posted.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'm sure it will do just as well as your last one! Keep on trying and believe in yourself!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot to me. You're the best for supporting me in my writing journey.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'm always here for you! You've got so much talent, just keep going for it!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I will! I actually started on a book recently since my movie did well! [image: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a handwritten page]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a handwritten page

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Nice! I'm curious, what is it about?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That page specifically has some dialogues exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness. It's a deep and emotional story that I'm really excited about!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, Joanna! It sounds awesome. I'm so excited to see how it all plays out!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! I'm so glad you're excited. I've never really tried publishing a book, but this might be the first!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Good luck on that! I'm sure people will recognise you as the same author of the movie you got published and love the book even more.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Your belief in me means a lot. I'll keep doing my best. Thanks for the support!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No problem, Joanna. I'm here for you. Your hard work will pay off, I promise. Believe in yourself and your talent - you're incredible!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in a container

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, long time no talk! I've been busy with writing projects and really going all out with it. It's been the best thing ever - a mix of highs and lows - and my journal's pretty much my rock. Writing's such a huge part of me now. [image: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! Great to hear it! It's amazing how much a certain activity can become a part of our lives. Keep it up, you're inspiring! Is writing your way to solace and creativity?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, definitely. Writing has become like an escape and a way to express my feelings. It gives me a chance to put all my thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it. Words just have a magical way of healing.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's really cool, I like it! It's incredible how words can turn something sad into something special. I'm glad it worked for you. Anything cool happening recently?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yep. Last week, someone wrote me a letter after reading an online blog post I made about a hard moment in my life. Their words touched me; they said my story had brought them comfort. It was awesome to realize my words had that kind of power. It reminded me why I love writing. [image: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Nice work, Joanna! That must feel sureal. Keep it up - you're changing lives!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Really appreciate your kind words. It's knowing that my writing can make a difference that keeps me going, even on tough days. So glad to have this outlet to share my stories and hopefully have an impact. How about you? Anything new since we last talked?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! Your words mean a lot. Since we last spoke, I started teaching people how to make this. Sharing my love for dairy-free desserts has been fun and rewarding. [image: a photography of a dessert with whipped cream and chocolate sauce]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dessert with whipped cream and chocolate sauce

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yum, Nate! I love it when you make coconut milk icecream, it's so good!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I've been really into making this lately - it's creamy, rich, dairy-free and a new recipe! Wanna try it? I can share the recipe with you if you'd like!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'd love to try it! Thanks for sharing your love for dairy-free desserts. I really appreciate it!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No problem, Joanna! Always happy to share them with you. Sending you the recipe now!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Can't wait to surprise my family with something delicious!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No problem, Joanna! Wish them luck! Let me know how it goes. Have a blast baking!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate. I'll keep you posted. Have a great day.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You too!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Woah Joanna, I won an international tournament yesterday! It was wild. Gaming has brought me so much success and now I'm able to make a living at something I'm passionate about - I'm loving it.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Congrats, Nate! So proud of you for winning that tournament, that's awesome! Must feel great to turn your passion into a career.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'm really stoked to see all my hard work paying off! I'm super proud of what I accomplished. On another note, my little dudes got a new tank! Check them out, they're so cute, right?! [image: a photo of a fish tank with a fish inside of it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a fish tank with a fish inside of it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow Nate, they're adorable! I can see why you enjoy spending time with them. It looks like they have so much more room to swim now!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: They're my little buddies, always calm and peaceful. It makes coming home after a long day of gaming better. The tank expansion has made them so happy! How have you been?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'm good! Was super nervous last week when I shared my book with my writers group but got some great feedback. My hard work is paying off, it's such an awesome feeling! [image: a photo of a desk with a chair and a computer]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a chair and a computer

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Jo, you're killing it! Getting this kind of feedback means people are really connecting with your writing. Pretty cool! Did you celebrate?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dessert in a glass on a counter

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! It feels great knowing that people like my writing. I celebrated by making this delicious treat - yum! Any plans for the weekend? [image: a photo of two desserts with spoons and a bar of chocolate]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two desserts with spoons and a bar of chocolate

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'm taking some time off this weekend to chill with my pets. Anything cool happening with you?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'm relaxing and recharging this weekend with a long walk and some reading. It's a good break.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Looks like we both need a break. I'm glad your able to find a way to recharge! It's so incredibly important to take time off!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! I've learned that taking breaks and looking after myself are important for my inspiration and mental health. It's all about finding balance.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, balance is key! It's so cool how taking care of ourselves helps us be more creative and happier. I'm always looking for something new to read. Got any book recommendations? I've got a lot of books to choose from. [image: a photo of a bookcase filled with books and a toy car]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bookcase filled with books and a toy car

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I reccomend finding a fantasy book series to read through. Most fiction series are great reads when your trying to relax.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Good idea! How about this series? [image: a photo of a stack of books sitting on top of a wooden table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a stack of books sitting on top of a wooden table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's a great one! Let me know what you think when your finished!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sure thing! And since your recommending me a book, I thought I should do the same! I'd really recommend this series. It's got awesome battles and interesting characters. [image: a photo of a poster of a man falling off a cliff]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a poster of a man falling off a cliff

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that series looks awesome! I'll have to check it out sometime!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You really should! The action scenes are awesome and the plot rocks. Definitely one of my favorites!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, sounds great! I'll definitely add it to my list; thanks for the recommendation!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Enjoy it! Have a good day.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! You too! Have a great day. Take care.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! Long time no talk. So much has happened. Look how cute they are! Hanging with them has been a big help, especially recently. Speaking of which, I just had a letdown in a video game tourney - I didn't do too great, even though I tried. It was a setback, but I'm trying to stay positive. [image: a photography of two turtles sitting on a rock in a pond]
turns.image_caption: a photography of two turtles sitting on a rock in a pond

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Cute turtles! Bummer about the setback. Any positive vibes comin' your way? I just revised on of my old recipes and made this! [image: a photo of a piece of cake with strawberries and chocolate]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a piece of cake with strawberries and chocolate

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, yeah it's a bummer that I didn't do well. But it's all part of the learning curve, you know? Also that looks super good! Anyways, how are you holding up?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'm doing OK, thanks. Just been tinkering with that recipe and a few others. It's helping me find some comfort and getting creative.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: What else are you making? It's always satisfying to see the kind of things you do when your in one of those moods!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Been tweaking a dessert recipe to make it yummier and more accessible.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, that sounds great! What flavors are you experimenting with?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Trying out different flavors like chocolate, raspberry, and coconut has been a blast!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds delicious! Are you only trying dairy-free options?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, since I'm lactose intolerant I'm trying out dairy-free options like coconut or almond milk instead. It's been a fun challenge seeing how to make yummy treats that suit everyone's diets. I even made these dairy-free chocolate coconut cupcakes with raspberry frosting. [image: a photo of a plate of cupcakes with different toppings]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plate of cupcakes with different toppings

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Woah, those look great, Joanna! It's cool that you make desserts that work for everyone's diets. Do you have any more yummy recipes hiding in there?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yep! I've been making all sorts of desserts that work for everyone's diets - cookies, pies, cakes - everything! I'll share more recipes with you soon.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Can't wait to try them. Can I join you sometime? I think baking and cooking really brings us together!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a pile of cookies with sprinkles on a wooden table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, Nate! A fellow Chef in the kitchen is always a great help! Speaking of which, i'm curious, any more tips for dairy-free baking?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You can use stuff like dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter, and make sure to check the labels to ensure they're dairy-free. Good luck!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Love your ideas, can't wait to try them out!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cookie with chocolate drizzle and almonds

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No problem! I love to help, so just shoot me a question anytime you need!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Got it Nate, I'll see you soon!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Bye Joanna! Good luck!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, long time no see! My laptop crashed last week and I lost all my work - super frustrating! As a writer, my laptop is like half of my lifeline so losing all progress was like a major blow.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, sorry to hear about that. Losing so much progress must be really frustrating. Did you manage to recover anything? Maybe consider backing up your work in the future?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks for the sympathy, Nate. Nothing was recoverable, but now I have an external drive for backups. I never want to go through this again. So, how have you been? Making anything cool?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, I'm no writer like you, but something pretty awesome happened. Last Monday I got to teach people vegan ice cream recipes on my own cooking show! It was a bit nerve-wracking to put myself out there, but it was a blast. Plus, I picked up a few new recipes!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Way to go, Nate! Congrats on the cooking show, I'll definitely be tuning in! What's your favorite dish from the show?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Coconut milk ice cream is at the top of my list. It's so smooth and creamy with a tropical coconut twist. Plus, it's dairy-free for people who can't have lactose or who want vegan options. Here's a snap of the ice cream I made. [image: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon on a table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that looks amazing, Nate! I love the color and texture. It's great that you're making these options. Could you share the recipe? I'd love to try making it sometime!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah sure! Would love to share it. Let's spread the joy of dairy-free options! Let me know when you make it!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Cool, Nate! Gonna give it a go. Dairy-free is a must for me, especially for desserts. Last Friday, I made a deeeelish dessert with almond milk - it was good! Got any favs when it comes to dairy-free desserts?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Coconut milk ice cream is one of my favorites as you might be able to tell, but I also love a dairy-free chocolate mousse. It's super creamy and tastes like the real thing. What's been your favorite dairy-free sweet treat so far?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, my favorite dairy-free treat is this amazing chocolate raspberry tart. It has an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries - it's delicious! [image: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That looks amazing, Joanna! I need to try baking that. What other treats do you like making?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, I love making this dairy-free chocolate cake with raspberries. It's so moist and delicious - perfect sweetness level. [image: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That cake looks amazing, Joanna! How did you make it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I make it with almond flour, coconut oil, chocolate and raspberries. It's my favorite for birthdays and special days.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yum, Joanna! Gotta try that one. Any others you want to share?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Here's another recipe I like. It's a delicious dessert made with blueberries, coconut milk, and a gluten-free crust. So creamy and delicious! [image: a photo of a piece of cake with walnuts on top]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a piece of cake with walnuts on top

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, Joanna! That dessert looks amazing. I'll definitely have to give it a try. Thanks!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Glad to help, Nate. Let me know if you try it. I'm sure you'll enjoy it. It was great chatting.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! I will. Bye!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, hi! Yesterday, I tried my newest dairy-free recipe and it was a winner with my family! Mixing and matching flavors is fun and I'm always trying new things. How about you? [image: a photo of a tart with raspberries on a white plate]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a tart with raspberries on a white plate

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! That tart looks yummy! Lately, I've been doing great - I won a really big video game tournament last week and it was awesome! I still can't believe I made so much money from it. [image: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Way to go, Nate! Winning the tournament and earning cash is awesome - congrats! Did you save it for something special?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! Yeah, I saved some but I'm not sure what to do with it - I'm completely content already. I don't have big plans anyway, so it's nice to have the extra cash on hand.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's awesome, Nate! Having some extra cash on hand definitely brings a sense of freedom and relaxation, huh?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yes! Finally, I don't have to stress about it, so I can just enjoy my movies and games.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Taking breaks and reducing stress is pretty nice! Have you watched any good movies recently? I could use some recommendations!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I watched "Little Women" recently, and it was great! The acting was awesome and the story was so captivating. Definitely a good one!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I'm so glad you enjoyed it! I recommended it to you a while back. I watched it too and it really spoke to me. Themes like sisterhood, love, and chasing dreams were explored so well. By the way, I finished up my writing for my book last week. Put in a ton of late nights and edits but finally got it done. I'm so proud of it! Can't wait to see what happens next.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Way to go! We both know it took some effort, but I'm sure it'll be great. Congrats on finishing it up!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! Your words mean a lot. Dedication and late nights got me here, but it was worth it. Just like you with your recent tournament - hard work pays off. I appreciate your support throughout!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'm always here for you, Joanna! You've worked so hard and accomplished a lot – I'm proud. Keep on going!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! I won't give up on my goals as long as your here to support me.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You can always count on me! I even made this for you! [image: a photo of a white board with a drawing of arrows and words]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a white board with a drawing of arrows and words

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, Nate, that looks awesome! What inspired you?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I figured you could always look back on this whenever you need encouragement, and that was all the inspiration I needed. And I would also say that your life path can be quite inspirational!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a young boy drawing on a white board

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, Nate! That's sweet of you! I'll make sure to remember this when I need the encouragement the most.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Awesome! I know encouragement is what got me so far in my gameing career, so I figured why not share the love.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Rest assured, it will be something I cherish! On another note, I just finished this cute little bookmark for one of the ladies at my writing club! [image: a photo of a bookmark with a plant on top of it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bookmark with a plant on top of it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That bookmark is great. I'm sure she'll love it!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! I absolutley love DIYs, and I know she does too.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Let me know how it goes!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sure thing! Bye for now!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, it's been a couple days since we last talked. Something exciting happened last Friday. I went to a game convention and met new people who weren't from my normal circle. It was a bit overwhelming but it reminded me of the good times gaming can bring. [image: a photo of a man standing in front of a table with board games]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man standing in front of a table with board games

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Good to hear from you. Sounds like fun! Meeting new people can be overwhelming, but the rewards can be great. Sometimes it's good to step outside our comfort zones and explore new things.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, you're right! We can have great experiences if we take risks. I even made some friends at the convention who love games just like me. We already planned a gaming session together - it's cool to meet people who have the same interests! [image: a photo of two people dressed up in costumes posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two people dressed up in costumes posing for a picture

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That looks awesome! I'm glad you met people who share your interests - that definitely makes experiences more fun..

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I also met some people who also played this boardgame I love, so I joined in. We had a lot in common and hit it off. It's great when shared hobbies can bond people! [image: a photo of a group of people sitting around a table playing a board game]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people sitting around a table playing a board game

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: It's incredible how a game can bring people together and form strong relationships. Did you do anything else there?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: We played this game Catan - it's a great strategy game where you build settlements and trade resources. I love it! [image: a photo of a board game with a blue board and a yellow board]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a board game with a blue board and a yellow board

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Looks cool! Is it more of a competitive game or a more chill one?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: It can be both competitive and chill. We were competing, but still had lots of fun.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Competitive games can definitely be difficult to play sometimes when people get all upset about every move you make, but it's cool they were all chill! Glad you had a good time.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: It was great! Playing games is my escape from life struggles, so I generally don't get crazy competitive over them. The people at the convention were the same way!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Glad you found a way to have fun and escape! It's important to stay happy and de-stress. Keep doing what makes you happy!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: For sure! You should go to a writing convention or something sometime! The experience at this convention is unforgetable.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Do writing conventions exist? I'll have to look into that, it could be fun! Thanks for the idea. Have you been up to anything tonight?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Mostly just chilling at home. Playing video games or watching movies helps me unwind. [image: a photo of a bookcase filled with dvds and movies]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bookcase filled with dvds and movies

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That sounds great! What's your favorite game or movie that you've seen recently?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I recently saw a movie that blew my mind with all the twists and dream stuff, I think it was called "Inception". I've also been playing a game nonstop with a great futuristic setting and gameplay called "Cyberpunk 2077". Have you seen or played anything good lately?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I watched a classic movie the other day that was awesome - the story was so gripping and the actors were great! It really stuck with me. [image: a photo of a framed movie poster with a signed picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a framed movie poster with a signed picture

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, that must have been awesome! What would you rate it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Well, it was amazing, so probably 9 or 10 out of 10! Movies can take us to different places and make us feel lots of emotions. What do you love about watching them?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Well they take me to new worlds and fill me with emotions. Plus, they're great for chilling out after a day.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I agree! They have the power to take us away and make us feel things not normally experienced in life. It's a great escape! Especially when you have a room like this! [image: a photo of a living room with a tv and candles]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a living room with a tv and candles

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, it's so comfy in there! I should really get a set up like that.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: You should! It's one thing to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, I feel so at peace!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Any pointers on what I should get for my living room to make it comfy like that?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sure! For one, you should get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure its really fluffy! Also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds like you really got into making your living room! Thanks, I'll try that out for myself!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: No problem! I get super invested in random little things like that, but I think its all worth it when I end up with random little things that make life so much nicer.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks for the tip! See you later!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: See ya Nate!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, what's been up? Haven't seen you since we last talked.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! I have been revising and perfecting the recipe I made for my family and it turned out really tasty. What's been happening with you?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! That's cool. I've been getting so stressed lately because of my tournament progress - tough competitors - but my turtles always cheer me up.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Pets have a way of brightening our days. I still have that stuffed animal dog you gave me! I named her Tilly, and she's always with me while I write.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cat laying on the floor in a room

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Glad to hear it! What made you name her Tilly?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I used to have a dog back in Michigan with that name, but then I got allergic and we had to get rid of her. The name helps me remember her back when I used to be able to hold and squeeze animal without an allergic reaction!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's so touching! Glad the stuffed animal means so much!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Tilly helps me stay focused and brings me so much joy. It's amazing how even stuffed animals can do that!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: It really is, I'm not sure I'll ever understand why watching my turtles slowly walk around makes me so happy. But I'm very glad it does.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Same here! So have you been up to anything recenly?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, I've just been practicing for my next video game tournemant. How about you?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Well, I had a bit of a setback recently - another rejection from a production company.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Bummer, Joanna. Is this the one you sent to a film contest? Rejections suck, but don't forget they don't define you. Keep at it and you'll find the perfect opportunity.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah.. Thanks, Nate. It's hard, but I won't let it slow me down. I'm gonna keep grinding and moving ahead.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's what I like to hear! I really respect you for that and being able to bounce back whenever something sad happens!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot. I'm gonna keep pushing forward and believing in myself.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You got this, and don't ever forget that you have people cheering you on from the sidelines wherever you go.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks! I'll see you around!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No problem! Catch you later!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, what's been up since we last chatted? How's it going?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time! It was such a surreal experience to see everything come together. I felt a mix of emotions, but overall, it was a satisfying moment. I've been waiting for this for a long time!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text:
Congrats Joanna! How was it to finally see it on the big screen?

[shares a photo holding a videogame controller]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. [image: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Joanna, those drawings are really incredible! What inspired you to create them?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! They're visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in my head so I can write better.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Joanna, that's so cool! It's amazing how our imaginations can bring ideas to life. Can you tell me more about the character on the left in the photo?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nope! You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You got it. I was already planning on watching it, but talking to you about it makes me want to watch it even more!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I was bored today, so I just took my turtles out for a walk. [image: a photography of two turtles sitting on a log in a pond]
turns.image_caption: a photography of two turtles sitting on a log in a pond

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sound fun! Did they have a good time?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Of course! They look tired from all the walking, so they're relaxing in the tank right now. [image: a photography of a dog laying on a rock in a zoo]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dog laying on a rock in a zoo

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Aww, they're so cute! What do they eat?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a spoon full of ice cream and chocolate sauce

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: They eat a combination of vegetables, fruits, and insects. They have a varied diet.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a container of lettuce and other greens

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that's fascinating! It's interesting how they have such a varied diet, including insects. Do you have a favorite among their food choices?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I love seeing them eat fruit - they get so hyped and it's so cute! [image: a photography of a group of strawberries and a turtle on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a group of strawberries and a turtle on a table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that's so cute! They look like they really enjoy fruit.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, it's adorable! Watching them enjoy their favorite snacks is so fun. I also like holding them. [image: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in their hand]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in their hand

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Do they have different personalities, like the way dogs and cats do?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a rock formation with a person standing on the side

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, they each do. One is more adventurous while the other is more reserved, which I find cute. Having them around brings me joy and they make great companions.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's super cool! I never knew turtles could be so interesting until I met your turtles. Wow!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I've always liked turtles since I was a boy, so I know all about them!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: You'll have to keep me posted on them! It's been fun chatting!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: See you later Joanna!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, Nate, I'm on fire! I just set up meetings with movie producers — my dreams are comin' true!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Joanna, nice work! How did it go with those producer meetings?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! The meetings went really well. I felt confident discussing my script and vision and they seemed interested and excited. They loved the elements of self-discovery in it. It was so validating to be taken seriously. I'm feeling hopeful and inspired about the future!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Way to go, Joanna! Putting yourself out there is really brave and winning recognition for your hard work feels great. It's just like when I win a video game tournament - it feels awesome! I'm so proud of you and so glad you're feeling hopeful and inspired.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a television screen showing a game being played

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot. Writing isn't always easy but moments like these make me appreciate it. I'm so thankful for all the opportunities. Last week, I found these old notebooks with my early writings - it was cool to see how far I've come. [image: a photo of a notebook with a list of things to write]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a list of things to write

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That's cool! You must love seeing how you've grown as an artist. Is there a favorite piece from your early writings that stands out to you?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yup, I still remember this story from when I was 10. It was about a brave little turtle who was scared but explored the world anyway. Maybe even back then, I was inspired by stories about finding courage and taking risks. It's still a part of my writing today.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You obviously have a passion for writing, and it's funny the story was about a turtle! Their resilience is so inspiring! Take courage and keep pushing yourself with your writing. Great job!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! They make me think of strength and perseverance. They help motivate me in tough times - glad you find that inspiring!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: What can I say, I love turtles. So, what's been happening with you?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Apart from meetings, I'm working on a project - challenging but fulfilling. How about you? What's been going on?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Just been helping some friends reset their high scores at the international tournament. It's been fun!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, sounds like so much fun! You're really passionate about gaming. Have an awesome time and keep helping others with those high scores!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks! It feels good to use my skills to make a difference.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I couldn't agree more! Which is why my meetings are so exciting!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: On another note, want to come over and try some of this? It's super yummy, just made it yesterday! [image: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Mmm, that looks delicious! Is it lactose-free by any chance?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yep, I made it with coconut milk so it's lactose-free!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks so much, Nate! Sure! I'll come over tomorrow if that's fine.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I don't see why not! I'm not doing anything then, so your completely welcome to!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Awesome! I'll bring some of my recipes so we can both share deserts!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I'd love that! I've been wanting to try some of your chocolate and rasberry cake for a while now.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: You got it! See you tomorrow!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: See you then! Take care!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna! Hope you’re doing alright. Crazy thing happened - I was in the final of a big Valorant tournament last Saturday, and I won! It was the best feeling to see my name as the champion. Tournaments really bring out strong emotions in me.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate! Congrats on winning the tournament - that's awesome! I know you must have been buzzing! Anyway, I've been working on something exciting too. Last Friday, I finished the presentation for producers - it was tough but it's looking good. What have you been up to? [image: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter on it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! I've been having a blast and preparing for other tournaments, so I've been real busy - but I'm loving it!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sounds like you're really loving life right now! It's great when you find something that suits you. Being busy can be tiring but it's so rewarding in the end. Keep it up!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book with a black border and a white title

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! I'm really grateful to have a job I enjoy every day. So anyways, anything new going on in your life?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: I am writing another movie script! It's a love story with lots of challenges. I've put lots of hard work into it and I'm hoping to get it on the big screen.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks Nate! Writing has always been a passion of mine. I got the idea for this script from a dream. How have your turtles been? I haven't seen pictures of them in a while!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Great actually! These little guys sure bring joy to my life! Watching them is so calming and fascinating. I've really grown fond of them. So, what about you, Joanna? What brings you happiness?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Creating stories and watching them come alive gives me happiness and fulfillment. Writing has been such a blessing for me.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Well with dedication like yours, its no wonder you do so well in it as well! Are you planning on submitting anymore scripts anytime soon?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yep! I actually just submitted a few more last week! Hoping to hear back from them soon, though I assume a few will be rejected.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate the encouragement. I won't give up, I promise! Got it covered!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Great to hear! On another note, I just upgraded some of my equipment at home. Check it out! [image: a photo of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Oh wow, ice set-up! Do you use that computer for gaming?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yep! This is where I practice and compete. Sometimes I even use it when I'm playing games with friends.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Cool! Having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help you stay focused.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, I love it. It's like my own little haven to escape into the virtual world.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with two monitors and a laptop

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that sounds great to have your own gaming setup at home. It must be really awesome!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: It really is! But it's also really important to have something like this for my career, otherwise I would never be able to beat my competition. [image: a photo of a pair of headphones and a video game controller]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a pair of headphones and a video game controller

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That makes sense! It's all about practice isn't it? So what's your favorite game?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yep! I'm currently playing this awesome fantasy RPG called "Xeonoblade Chronicles" and it's been a blast! I highly reccomend it if you've never played it before. [image: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: What made you start playing it? That's a japanese game series right?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yes it is! I'm a big fan of Nintendo games, and I've actually been wanting to play this one for a while because my friends have played it and reccomended it!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nice! It's really cool when a reccomendation from a friend fits your taste so well isn't it?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: For sure! That's why I love when you give me movie reccomendations, I usually like them a lot more then if I were to just watch some random one.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Great to hear! I just finished with the intro to my next movie script, and I decided to include this at the begining. [image: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That letter is really awesome! Does it remind you of your childhood?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yeah, it does! My brother wrote it - he used to make me these cute notes when we were kids. Brings back sweet memories.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Aww, childhood memories can be so powerful!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: They sure can! They take us back to simpler times but it's nice to create new memories as we grow up.
turns.image_caption: a photo of two little girls in pink dresses standing in front of a castle

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Totally! I had a special day when I took my pets to the park. They were amazed and seeing their happy faces made it a memorable day. Mixing the new with the old is priceless - I treasure every memory!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That sounds so sweet, Nate! I started writing some of my favorite memories down. [image: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Dang, your full of great ideas Joanna! I really should start doing that as well, or at least write down the things my animals like a lot!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: You should! I completely encourage it, looking back on fond memories is such a blessing.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Ok I will! But I'll also start writing down some of my favorite memories with you from now on.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Definitely, let's keep making great memories and supporting each other. Let's keep reaching for our dreams and make them happen!
turns.image_caption: a photo of two women sitting on a bed laughing and laughing

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, what a wild week! My game tournament got pushed back, so I tried out some cooking. Look at this homemade coconut ice cream! The sprinkles kinda changed the color this time around. [image: a photo of a person scooping a scoop of ice cream into a pan]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person scooping a scoop of ice cream into a pan

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, that looks yummy! Wish I could try it, but I can't right now. How did the last game tournament go?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, thanks! Tough tournament, didn't make it to the finals. But that's okay, I'll get 'em next time!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Aww, bummer! But the important thing is to stay positive. So, what's your next move in the gaming world?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! Staying positive is key. I'm thinking of joining a new gaming team after this next tourney - I've had a few offers, but I haven't decided yet. It's gonna be a big step, but I'm ready for a shake up.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Sounds great, Nate! Making a switch could open up new opportunities. Wishing you luck with picking the right team!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks, Joanna! I really appreciate it. It's a big decision, but I'm excited for what the future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening on your end?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yup! I worked hard on another script and eventually created a plan for getting it made into a movie. It was a ton of work but satisfying. I pitched it to some producers yesterday and they really liked it. It gave me a big confidence boost!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Congrats on the chance to pitch your script - super impressive. Proud of you!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Appreciate you, Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot to me. I feel like I just can't stop writing write now! [image: a photo of a pen and notebook on a table with a book]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a pen and notebook on a table with a book

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Anytime. What're you working on in that notebook? Anything cool?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, I'm working on a new project - a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town. It's been a great creative outlet for me. How about you? Do you have any projects you're working on?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah actually - creating gaming content for YouTube. It's a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy my video game cravings at the same time when there aren't any tourneys going on. [image: a photo of a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, that's a cool idea! What inspired you to start making gaming videos?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Hey Joanna, I'm a big fan of them and thought it would be a fun idea to start making them myself. I'm hoping to share my love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Way to go, Nate! Making videos and connecting with people about gaming - that's awesome! You'll do great!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Thanks Joanna! Appreciate the support. It's new to me but I'm excited to get started!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Make sure you watch other peoples videos first so you get a handle on what your audience likes! That way your videos don't flop when you post them.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen displaying a product listing

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Already doing that, but thanks for the advice! [image: a photo of a computer screen with a message on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen with a message on it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: No worries, Nate! It's great to support each other in reaching our goals. On another note, check out this pic I got a while back! [image: a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow, that sunset pic looks incredible! What inspired you to take that photo?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Thanks, Nate! I took that pic on a hike last summer near Fort Wayne. The sunset and the surrounding beauty were just incredible. It was an awesome reminder of nature's beauty.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: That sounds incredible! Nature truly has a way of reminding us to appreciate the beauty around us, and moments like those really stay with you. These critters also make me appreciate life's little joys. And guess what? I got them a new friend! [image: a photo of three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond]
turns.image_caption: a photo of three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow, what made you get a third?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Turtles really bring me joy and peace. They have such an effect on us - best buddies ever! I saw another at a pet store and just hade to get him. The tank is big enough now for three, so I figured why not!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle swimming in a tank with a metal bar

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Wow! It's always a shock where life will take us next! I bet just last week you would have never thought you would be getting a third turtle this year!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: You got that right, but I'm very happy with the descision and wouldn't have it any other way.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Can I come over sometime and watch you play with them? From a distance I mean, since I'm allergic.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Definitely! I'd love to have you over again. Maybe we can watch one of your movies together or go to the park!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: For sure! I'd love to do either of those things with you!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Sounds good. Well I'll make sure I give the turtles a bath before you get here so they're ready to play.

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Alright, see you tomorrow!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Bye Joanna!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Nate, can you believe it? I'm finally filming my own movie from the road-trip script! [image: a photo of a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Congrats, Joanna! Not surprised at all that your hard work paid off. Must feel awesome to see your script come alive in a movie! Pretty cool when something you love brings success, right? Tell me more about your movie!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Woohoo, thanks Nate! It's pretty wild to see it come alive. Every day on set is awesome and full of potential. Being able to show my vision is awesome.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: I think so too! What's been the coolest moment on set?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a fish tank with a fish inside of it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: One of the actors came up to me and told me how much she liked my script! I was so excited when that happened - it gave me chills!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Wow Joanna, that must have been so exciting! It's incredible when you get those moments of joy. Anyway, I took my turtles to the beach in Tampa yesterday! They always bring me peace in the craziness of life.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle in a sink with a reflection of its head

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Woah, that's awesome, Nate! You must really enjoy having them around - they're so cool! What do you love most about having them?

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Your completely right! I really love having them around. They're so cool and they make me feel calm. Plus, they don't require much looking after, which is great. I love seeing them soaking in the sun like this. [image: a photo of a turtle sitting on a log in a pond]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a turtle sitting on a log in a pond

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: That's awesome, Nate! They look so serene and happy. It's great to have something like that.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Yeah, turtles are like zen masters! They always remind me to slow down and appreciate the small things in life. I'm loving experimenting with flavors right now. Here are some colorful bowls of coconut milk ice cream that I made. [image: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Hey Nate, that looks really yummy! The colors and mix-ins give it a nice kick.

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: Nice! I'm glad you like it too. This recipe really jazzes it up. Wanna give it a try?

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Definitely, Nate! That ice cream looks mouthwatering. Thanks so much for offering!

turns.speaker: Nate
turns.text: No worries, Joanna. Hope you enjoy it!

turns.speaker: Joanna
turns.text: Yea, no worries! It was great catching up. Take it easy!

event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna takes a road trip to a small Midwestern town Woodhaven for research on her next movie script and is inspired by the history of the town and its interesting people.
Joanna starts writing a book on a deep and emotional story after seeing the movie she helped co-write do well.
Nate wins his fourth video game tournament
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna is reminded of why she loves writing after she receives a letter from one of the readers of her blog post on how her words brought them comfort.
Nate starts teaching others how to make coconut milk ice cream.
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna shares her new book on a deep and emotional story with her local writers group for feedback.
Joanna makes a dairy-free parfait to celebrate getting positive feedback from her local writers group about her book.
Joanna plans to relax and recharge by taking a long walk on the beach and reading books over the weekend.
Nate enters and wins an international video game tournament, and is now able to make a living out of his passion.
Nate gets a new tank for his two turtles.
Nate plans to take some time off to chill with his pet dog and turtles.
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna revises her dairy free recipe for chocolate strawberry cake.
Nate faces a setback because he doesn't do too well in a video game tournament.
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna loses her work after her laptop crashes.
Nate hosts a cooking show to teach people how to make vegan ice cream using coconut milk.
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna cooks her new dairy free recipe for chocolate raspberry tart for her family.
Joanna finishes writing the book on a deep and emotional story that she started writing in July.
Joanna makes a cute book mark for one the ladies at her local writing group
Nate wins another video game tournament and makes a lot of money from it
event_summaries.speaker: Joanna

events: Joanna watches a classic movie that she rates 9 out of 10
