turns.text: Haha, I can't wait!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Hi Audrey! How have you been lately? My girlfriend and I went to this awesome wine tasting last weekend. It was great! We tried so many unique wines and learned a lot. I was surprised at how much I enjoyed it. A reminder to step out of the comfort zone!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Hey! Ha, glad you had fun at the wine tasting. Yeah, trying new things can be cool. By the way, I had an unexpected adventure last week. I had an accident while playing with my pups at the park. Taking care of them with one arm has been tricky but we're managing. What's been up with you? Any new interests? [image: a photo of a person with a cast on their arm and arm in a cast]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person with a cast on their arm and arm in a cast

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Ouch! Are you feeling better? Sending healing vibes to you and your pups. So I recently tried out this new spot in town that serves sushi and it was great. Do you have anything that you've been wanting to try lately? [image: a photo of a plate of sushi and vegetables on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plate of sushi and vegetables on a table

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! Appreciate it, feeling better each day. And wow that Sushi looks phenomenal. I know what to get for dinner tonight.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Taking it one day at a time is the way to go. A while ago I've been curious about trying sushi. Never done it before, but always hear it's good. Now I understand what the hype is. Have you ever tried it? [image: a photo of a tray of sushi with a variety of toppings]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a tray of sushi with a variety of toppings

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yess! Sushi is delicious! I love them! There are so many types and flavors to try. Definitely give it a go and try different things! Don't limit yourself in your comofort zone! [image: a photo of a plate of sushi and vegetables on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plate of sushi and vegetables on a table

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks for the encouragement! I'm looking forward to trying more soon. Do you have any tips for someone who's new to sushi?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Definitely try a California or salmon roll first when trying sushi - they're easier. Mix it up with different sauces and dips too - it makes it more tasty. Enjoy and let me know how it goes! [image: a photo of a long plate of sushi with sauce on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a long plate of sushi with sauce on it

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks for the tips! Gonna go with a California or salmon roll and try out some sauces. I'll let you know how it goes. [image: a photo of a person eating sushi on a wooden board]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person eating sushi on a wooden board

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Glad to help! Can't wait to hear about your sushi adventure. Take your time and have fun! [image: a photo of a plate of sushi with avocado and shrimp]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plate of sushi with avocado and shrimp

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: I'm really excited to try different sushi. It's going to be a great time!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Have fun! You'll definitely need some time to get used to, but once you start I believe you'll love it! Take some pics and show me what you enjoy.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Haha, I'll make sure to take some photos and show you my sushi adventure.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Enjoy! Now I'm gonna order some sushi for tonight. Thanks!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Haha! You're welcomoe! Have a good one!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Take care and have a good one!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Hey Andrew, I wanted to let you know about something going on with my dogs. I noticed they weren't acting normally, so I made an appointment with an animal behaviorist last Wed. It's been a bit hectic but I'm hopeful it'll help me better understand them.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Oh no! Sorry to hear that your dogs haven't been themselves. Are they doing ok? How did the appointment with the animal behaviorist go? Did you receive any helpful advice or insights?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: The appointment went okay. It was hectic at first, but the behaviorist checked them out and asked some questions. I got some tips to try and help with their problems now.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: So what tips did you get? What will you be doing to help with the problems?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: The behaviorist gave me tips on how to handle it and suggested some changes in their routine. I'm using positive reinforcement techniques and it's still a work in progress, but I'm hopeful it'll help.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: I'm glad your pups are still good with positive reinforcement! How are they doing with the new approach tho?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: So far they seem to be responding well to it! It won't be fixed immediately but I'm seeing some progress. Here's hoping it keeps going.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: That's good to hear! Keep up the good work!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! Your words of encouragement really mean a lot. It's tough, but I'm devoted to keeping them healthy and happy - they mean everything to me.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: You're doing a great job! They're lucky to have you.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! They're really special to me and I want the best for them. Here's a pic of them having a blast last summer, so happy! I'm looking forward the day they are back to normal. [image: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Aww, they're having such a blast! What kind are they? I'm wishing you and your pups the best.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! They're all mutts, but Pepper and Panda are Lab mixes, and Precious and Pixie are Chihuahua mixes. I really need that. I can't wait the day they're all back to normal.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Sending prayers and wishes. Here's a pic I took at a national park I went a while ago. [image: a photography of a man hiking up a mountain with a backpack]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a man hiking up a mountain with a backpack

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Wow, that looks gorgeous! We hope to join you and the furry friends soon!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yeah I really hope your pups can get better and join us soon! [image: a photography of a man walking a dog on a leash]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a man walking a dog on a leash

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Wow, that trail looks nice! Looks like its dog friendly?

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yup! It's close by and it's dog-friendly too, with killer views. Wanna plan a hike soon?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Hmmm sure! Let's pick a date and go hike. It should be good!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yay! Does Saturday sound good? We can grab some snacks and have a blast exploring. Because on Sunday I am going on a picnic date with my girlfriend.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Saturday works for me! I'm going to bring some snack. Super excited!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Can't wait for our nature day with the fur babies! We're gonna have a good time!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Going hiking and seeing nature will be awesome. They'll be so happy! [image: a photo of a dog laying on the ground with a view of the ocean]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on the ground with a view of the ocean

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: I bet! Where do you guys plan to explore?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Let's check out the trail first. It's a peaceful spot to bring the fur babies for the day.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Sounds great! There's a lake near the trail too! It's gonna be awesome!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Oh nice! Can't wait to explore it and hang out with our furry friends. Should be a peaceful day! Here's a photo of the lake I found online. [image: a photo of a lake with a boat in it and a forest in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a lake with a boat in it and a forest in the background

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Wow, that looks awesome! Do you think the dogs will like it? Which trail do you have in mind?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Let's try that trail by the lake with great views, perfect for us and the pups. Should be fun!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Sounds great! They will love it by the lake. Can't wait!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Gonna be great - nature, furry pals - what more could we want? I'm so lucky to have a friend like you who loves exploring and being outside with our dogs. [image: a photo of a dog chasing a dog in a park]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog chasing a dog in a park

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Same! I'm lucky to have a friend like you for these outdoor trips. It's awesome to be out in nature with our furry friends. [image: a photo of a dog eating out of a bowl on the ground]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog eating out of a bowl on the ground

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yup! It's hard to find someone that has similar thoughts.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Exactly! Oh btw, here's another photo of a trail near the location. What do you think? [image: a photo of a forest with yellow trees and a blue sky]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a forest with yellow trees and a blue sky

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That looks pretty good! I'd love to take them there sometime.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: How about going there the next trip? The autumn colors are so beautiful!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Sounds great! The autumn colors would look awesome for pictures.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yeah, photos are gonna turn out great with the dogs!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Can't wait to capture some amazing moments with our furry friends!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: It definitely will be a memorable day!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yep, can't wait to make some awesome memories with our furry friends!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: You bet! Can't wait to see their happy face! This was my dog and I when we were hiking last time, see how happy he was? [image: a photography of a man and his dog on a trail]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a man and his dog on a trail

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Aww look at his happy face! I'm really looking forward to it! Can't wait to see my pups being happy and hiking.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Same here. Let's make it an epic and fun hike!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yep! It's gonna be so much fun.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Let me get ready, gonna head out soon. Ttyl!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yep ttyl!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Hey Audrey, had a great weekend! My girlfriend and I went on a bike ride and stumbled upon a cool park outside of town. It was awesome to get away from the city and be surrounded by nature. [image: a photo of two people riding bikes on a paved path]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two people riding bikes on a paved path

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That's cool! I love checking out new parks with my four pups. Last weekend was so fun - our dogs were able to run around and get some fresh air. On top of that, I recently joined a dog owners group to learn how to better take care of them. [image: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: That sounds great! Your four pups must have a lot of fun. How often do you hang out with the dog owners group?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yeah, they're having a lot of fun. I try to meet up with other dog owners once a week for tips from other parents and so they can all play together. How about you? Have you ever thought about joining one?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: That looks fun! Seeing those adorable pups made me think about getting another dog, but I'm still not sure. Having two dogs is already a lot to take care of. Do you have any tips on being a multi-dog pet owner?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Maybe you want to take care of Toby and Buddy first. Having them happy and healthy would be a good first step before going all in for more dogs.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks, I think that's what I need to hear. I'll take good care of my dogs first.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That's great! Let me know if you need any help, I'm here for you! See how happy they are? You don't need more dogs to make them happy! :) [image: a photo of two dogs playing with a frisbee in a park]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two dogs playing with a frisbee in a park

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks Audrey! That's so nice of you. I think I've managed to make it work with dogs while still living in the city.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Yeah I feel you. Taking care of a pup in the city is tough but doable with the right approach. Keeping them active is key. Here's a pic of how I entertain them in my house with toys and games. [image: a photography of a basket full of stuffed animals on a wooden floor]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a basket full of stuffed animals on a wooden floor

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Wow, it's great to know there are ways to keep them active in the city. I'll keep that in mind. Thank you so much!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: You got it! There are lots of ways to keep them happy in the city. Make sure to socialize and exercise them daily. Get creative and add some mental stimulation too. Here's a pic of them playing fetch in the park - they love it! [image: a photography of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: That's so cute! What sort of activities do you do to stay mentally stimulated?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: We give them lots of activities to keep them busy - puzzles, training, hide-and-seek - they love it all! [image: a photography of a dog playing with a frisbee in a room]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dog playing with a frisbee in a room

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Cool ideas! I think I'll give those activities a try with my pups. Thanks!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: No problem, glad I could help. Let me know how it goes.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Your advice and support really mean a lot to me! Thank you so much!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That's what friends are for - supporting each other. Your friendship means a lot to me. :)

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Hey Andrew! Long time no talk! Last Friday I took my fur kids to the pet salon - they were so psyched and their tails were wagging like crazy! It took a while for them to calm down, but all cut up they looked so cute!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Hey Audrey! Nice to hear from you. Sounds adorable! Do you have any pictures of them all groomed up?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Here's a pic of them, looking all groomed. Look at those shiny coats! To top it off, they were really good at the salon - I always worry about them in new places. [image: a photography of a dog is standing on a table with a leash]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dog is standing on a table with a leash

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Wow, they look great! Love seeing them happy and calm in new places.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! It means a lot to see them happy and settled in new places. I guess I'm doing a good job as a doggy mom then, haha! Have you taken your furry friends to the groomers yet?

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: No, we haven't got the chance to take them to the groomer yet. But will do that soon! So guess what, I can't help myself but to adpot another dog the other day. Here's a photo of the doggo! [image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That's great news! What's the pups name?

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: It took us a while to decide, but we ended up going with 'Scout' for our pup - it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: That's a great name for your pup! Fits their adventurous spirit. What's Scout's first adventure gonna be?

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks! We're gonna take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park. It's not big, but we can all have fun and get some fresh air!

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Sounds like a great start for Scout! Start small, and gradually give them more exposure. They'll have a great time, just make sure to keep them leashed. [image: a photography of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yeah, safety first! For now, we're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside. That pic you of your dog at the park is so cute. So we got some essentials for their comfort and entertainment, like a bed, toys, and some puppy pads just in case. It's like their own little safe haven.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Wow, that's so great that you two are creating a safe and fun space for Scout. It's really important they have a place that makes them feel secure. Slowly introduce Scout to Toby and Buddy, it takes time for the pups to get used to each other too! Scout is so lucky to have you and your girlfriend!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Thanks! We feel so lucky to have Scout. It's been amazing having so many furry friends! How are your dogs doing now?

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: They're doing great! Exploring, meeting new people...they feel so loved and safe. I'm really glad they're part of my life!

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: That's great to hear! Dogs truly bring so much joy and friendship. I'm glad they're happy with you.

turns.speaker: Audrey
turns.text: Thanks! They're really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. I'm so grateful to have them in my life as a part of my family.

turns.speaker: Andrew
turns.text: Yeah, it's great! Dogs are always there for us. We should count ourselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member.

qa_pairs.question: Which year did Audrey adopt the first three of her dogs?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey! Glad to finally talk to you. I want to ask you, what motivates you?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Video games give me tons of joy and excitement, so they keep me motivated!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, James! I'm a big video game fan too. They help me relax after a long day. What game are you currently enjoying the most?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm totally into The Witcher 3 right now. The story and atmosphere are amazing. Have you tried it yet?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Haven't played it yet, but I hear it's awesome. Gonna give it a go. BTW, just signed up for a programming class. Have you ever done any programming?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Programming is an awesome skill. I tried it out one in college and now it`s all my life. Good luck in the class! Do you have any coding experience?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I did a bit of coding in HTML and CSS a few years back. Thought I'd refresh those skills in this course. What languages do you like most and any projects you've done?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I've worked with Python and C++. I've built a website and also created some game mods. Here is one example. [image: a photo of a computer screen showing a video game scene]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen showing a video game scene

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That mod looks amazing! The graphics are awesome. What other programming languages have you worked with?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I haven’t worked with any other programming languages, but I hope to work in the future.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Maybe in the future we will develop mobile applications together? Do you like the idea?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It would be cool! For example, we could write some kind of application for dogs. By the way, my dogs. [image: a photo of two dogs are tied to a fence with a leash]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two dogs are tied to a fence with a leash

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Aww, they're adorable! What are the names of your pets? And what are your plans for the app?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Max and Daisy. Will be actually cool to build an app for dog walking and pet care. The goal is to connect pet owners with reliable dog walkers and provide helpful information on pet care.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Sounds good, James! Bet that app would find a lot of buyers. What sets it apart from other existing apps?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! The personal touch really sets it apart. Users can add their pup's preferences/needs - just like they were customizing it for them. Making it unique for each owner and pup.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a handwritten note on it

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's a great idea! Your pup is gonna love it. Speaking of personal touches, what motivates you to work on your programming projects?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Creating something and seeing it come to life gives me a great sense of accomplishment. It's an amazing feeling. I write down all my goals in a notebook. It's very satisfying to check off each one when it's done. [image: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: What are you working on that has you feeling so accomplished?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm working on something I've wanted to do since I was a kid. Even as a child, I made some sketches of the main character. Back then I was just drawing comics, but now I want to turn it into a computer game. It's a project that has me really excited. [image: a photo of a drawing of a girl in a plane]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a drawing of a girl in a plane

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James! That's amazing. What made you decide to work on it and create your own game?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm always excited to combine my favorite passions: gaming and storytelling. It's great creating my own project and bringing my ideas to life, plus the challenge is really enjoyable!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That sounds really fulfilling! Combining your passions to make something new must be so exciting. Can't wait to see the outcome.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a medical chart with instructions for the procedure

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks John! It's super exciting. I'll keep you updated on the progress. Perhaps, thanks to your knowledge of HTML, I'll invite you to help with some things in my game.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It will be great to work with you, James.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'll be looking forward to it. By the way, yesterday I went bowling and got 2 strikes. I love bowling!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm sure you're very good at this. Unfortunately, I can’t share my love for him with you, my fingers are too big. Perhaps I should take up exercise, at least start going for a run in the morning. And I also don’t like bowling itself, to be honest.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It's a pity, it would be nice to go play with you one day.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Well, I'm sure we can do something else. We can play slot machines and arcades, for example.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: The last time I played at the slot machines, I was so engrossed in the game that I didn't notice my wallet being taken out of my pocket. Sad story.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear it. Well, I'll be nearby, I'll look after your pockets.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Still, maybe we can try something different?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Heard about VR gaming? It's pretty immersive. We can try it together!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I tried it - it's crazy how real it feels! Have you given it a shot?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Tried it a few times, it's insane how immersive that experience can be. Can't wait to try it together with you.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, VR gaming is awesome! Let`s do it next Saturday!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Agreed, James!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, something awesome happened since we talked. I made a game avatar and joined a new platform. It's so fun exploring and chatting with other gamers - it's a whole new adventure every time! I feel like I'm part of a super cool online community.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, awesome! Glad you're enjoying it and connecting with others. Building a community is really cool, especially when you meet people who enjoy the same things.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! Connecting with other gamers has been great! We've shared tips, strategies, and stories about gaming. It's amazing how it brings people together, regardless of their backgrounds.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's incredible! It's so cool how gaming can bring people together and create a strong bond, regardless of their background.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, it's our shared language and passion. It's been a refuge for me in tough times.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, gaming always helps me escape stress. It's amazing how it calms me down during tough times.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Games are my go-to when I'm feeling overwhelmed. It's like therapy. I can relax, forget my troubles, and get lost in another world.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Gotcha. Gaming can be a great way to take a break and escape for a while. Anything new you've been into lately?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Lately, I've been checking out different styles of it. It's been fun to try something fresh and test myself in other ways. What about you, John? Any new hobbies recently?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I've been getting into a new hobby recently. I bought a metal detector and walk along the beaches looking for something worthwhile.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Interesting, John! Sounds like an awesome immersive experience. Already found something interesting?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Mostly just bottle caps, but a couple of times I found coins, and once even a gold ring.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool, I wish you good luck in this matter! By the way, I've got something to show you.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Show me what you've got! What is it?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Check out this pic of my best buds having a blast in the park. They've brought so much joy to my life. My two dogs are the best pals ever, right? [image: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: They look like they're having a blast! Can they do any tricks?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: They can do tricks like sit, stay, paw, and rollover. Here's a picture of Daisy waiting for a treat. I've done lots of training and they've picked it up fast. They're like my family. [image: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with a name tag]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with a name tag

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Aww, they're adorable! Pets are the best - they must make life so much better. I want one so bad, but I'm not there yet. Someday!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: A pet would truly be great for you! They bring so much love and companionship. If you're interested, I can help find the perfect one for you - you'd make a great pet parent!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cheers, James! Yeah, I'll keep that in mind. Appreciate the offer.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No problem, John! Let me know whenever you need assistance. Take care!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, long time no see! I had a big win in my game last week - finally advanced to the next level! It was a huge confidence booster and felt like I'd really achieved something.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, congrats on your win! Games can really boost confidence, huh? I'm challenging myself too - I'm learning this instrument, which has been quite the journey. [image: a photography of a drum kit with a white drum and a black drum]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a drum kit with a white drum and a black drum

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! I play drums too! Here's a pic of my set. [image: a photo of a drum kit sitting on top of a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a drum kit sitting on top of a table

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, looking good! How long have you been playing?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I've been playing for a month now, it's been tough but fun. How about you, how's it going?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: This is going great! I started a few days ago, so I'm still picking it up. Been at it daily and seeing improvements. It's tough but rewarding at the same time!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nice work! Looks like you're doing great. Anything new in general that you'd recommend?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks! I just got a new cutting-edge gaming system and the graphics are incredible. I've been playing all kinds of new games and it's been a great way to relax after work. Plus, I can connect with friends who share my passion for gaming.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, James! Gaming is great for chilling out. Btw, since we last spoke, I had the chance to go to a gaming convention - it was amazing! Tried out loads of games, met developers, and even took part in a tournament - unreal! Check out this pic I took! [image: a photography of a crowded convention hall with a large crowd of people]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a crowded convention hall with a large crowd of people

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that's awesome! What game was it for? Sounds like a dream!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I played my favorite CS:GO game in an intense tournament. It was awesome to see all the skilled players competing.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that sounds cool! Gaming is awesome with all the competition. Must have been thrilling to watch those skilled players!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It was indeed amazing! Watching those skilled players really inspired me to improve my own gaming skills.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Nice one, John! Learning from experienced gamers can really help you level up your skills. Keep it up!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm always looking to up my game and hit new goals. That same commitment is true for my hobbies and other stuff. What have you been doing to stay motivated?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Setting small goals and tracking my progress helps me stay motivated and focused.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nice one! Setting small goals and tracking progress is a great way to stay motivated - it helps you stay on track and celebrates progress. Anything specific you're working on or upcoming challenges you're pumped about?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm getting into different types of games now, like RPGs and strategy games. It's really exciting!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, James! That sounds exciting. Have fun exploring different genres of games!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm super hyped to explore different game genres. Let's see what's in store!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Definitely! Trying new genres is always exciting. I can't wait to hear about your journey with them. Please let me know how it goes!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Got it, John! I'll keep you updated on my gaming adventures with the new genres. Have a good day!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks! Can't wait to hear about it. Bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Long time no chat. What's up? Been playing any new games lately?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Yeah, it's been a while. I've been busy, but I joined an online gaming tournament yesterday. It was so intense and fun! Here is a photo report. [image: a photo of a group of people posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people posing for a picture

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That online gaming tournament looks awesome! Glad you had a blast. How did it go for you?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It was so much fun! I did pretty well in the tournament; I made it to the semis and won some rounds. It was such a rush! Here's a screenshot of my character. [image: a photo of a man in a costume standing in front of a sign]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man in a costume standing in front of a sign

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, awesome! Congrats on your performance and making it to the semifinals. How did the final rounds turn out?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks John! The final rounds were tough. I tried my best but didn't make it. It was close, though, and I had a blast competing with talented players. Looking forward to the next tournament!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man in a costume holding a sword

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Met any famous player there?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I met the whole team! It’s a pity I didn’t get a chance to take a photo with them, but one of them even gave me a couple of gaming tips.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man sitting in a chair playing a video game

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! I'm sure his advice will help you develop in the game.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, I'm sure of that too. Also, the whole team gave me autographs. I was very happy about this! [image: a photo of a notepad with a pen and a glass of water]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a pen and a glass of water

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: How cool is this! What advice do you remember most?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: The most important thing I remember is that you always need to communicate correctly with the team and never put your ego above team success.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people standing around a table

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, comms and teamwork are super important in gaming. When everyone works together, it's incredible what can be accomplished in a match. How do you usually communicate with your team?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I usually use voice chat to communicate with my team. It's fast and helps us work together effectively.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Sounds like a good plan. It really helps with communication. What game do you like playing with your team?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I've been playing my favourite game called Apex Legends with my team and it's intense! Check out this screenshot of us playing! [image: a photo of a video game screen showing a robot and a robot]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game screen showing a robot and a robot

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Man, Apex Legends looks tough! The graphics are unreal. How does it stack up against other games?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Apex Legends has awesome graphics and super fast-paced gameplay. It definitely stands out among other games.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hmm, the speed of it definitely makes it fun! Are there any new games that you're looking forward to trying out?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, I'm always excited to try new games. Thinking of trying RPGs like that or MOBAs. Sounds cool! [image: a photo of a video game cover of a video game]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game cover of a video game

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: RPGs and MOBAs can be awesome to experience an engaging story or have epic multiplayer fights. Let me know how you like them!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure thing, John! Can't wait to try out some new genres. I'll definitely let you know my thoughts once I give them a try.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Love hearing about it. Let's chat soon!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure John, I'll keep you updated on all the new games. Talk to you soon! Bye for now!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Let me know how it goes. Stay safe. Talk to you soon. Bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Long time no chat - I adopted a pup from a shelter in Stamford last week and my days have been so much happier with him in the fam. I named it Ned. Any progress on your gaming goals? [image: a photo of a dog and a cat sitting on a dog bed]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog and a cat sitting on a dog bed

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Congrats on getting a pup! They really do make days brighter. I haven't made much progress with gaming lately, life's been busy with work and stuff but it's always nice to remember how happy gaming makes me. It's a good way to forget the stresses of life.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! Gaming really does help forget about the stresses of life. It's like heading into another world! Have you played any interesting games lately?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm playing this new RPG that has a really cool story and world. It's kinda like getting transported to a futuristic dystopia. [image: a photo of a city at night with a view of the city]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a city at night with a view of the city

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds great! Will I like it? I'm always up for trying new games.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You'll love it! It has a fun story and an awesome world. Plus, it has some tough gameplay. However, the game is a little laggy and sometimes produces errors. Here is one of them that I came across yesterday. [image: a photo of a computer screen with a game on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen with a game on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: The game must still be raw. I'd rather wait until the bugs are completely fixed, and then I'll try it out.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Even with minor bugs, the game still looks great. The graphics are awesome and the gameplay is super immersive. I'm sure you should try it out now. I can send you a link.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Okay, you convinced me. Well, I'll wait for the link then, thanks!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, I'll send it to you. Let me know what you think after you check it out!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool, John! I'll check it out and let you know what I think. I'm excited to give it a try.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! Excited to hear your thoughts. Have a great time!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cheers! Will do. Enjoy the gaming! Bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Bye for now!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: See ya! Take care!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Take care!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Long time no see! I have great news! Last Tuesday I met three cool new friends in my programming course, they share the same passion as me and it's cool to grow my social circle. Have you had any fun surprises lately?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Glad you had a great week meeting new people! Something awesome happened to me last Thursday – I got to work with one of my gaming pals on a programming project! We combined programming and gaming, and created this virtual world inspired by Witcher 3. It was awesome to see our ideas come to life!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It must've felt great to put your skills to work on that project! Do you have any screenshots of the world you made? It must've been so awesome to see it all come together!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game screen with a man on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It was quite the experience. Unfortunately, I don't have a screenshot of the full virtual world, but I do have a screenshot of the game character I created. It was a lot of work but so rewarding when it all came together. Super satisfying! [image: a photo of a woman dressed in armor kneeling on a rock]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman dressed in armor kneeling on a rock

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James! This is amazing. I can really feel the atmosphere here. Did you get the inspiration for this from something?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, I'm glad you can feel the atmosphere. I got the idea from a walk with my dogs two weeks ago. We were walking around our neighborhood, and a stranger was walking towards us. I had never seen her nearby before. Her eyes and appearance amazed me so much, it seemed to me that I fell in love at first sight. It’s a pity that I didn’t approach her to get to know her, but at least I remembered her appearance and embodied it in the game.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's awesome. Real-life experiences can be so inspiring. It's like the virtual world is connected to the real world. By the way, two days ago I wanted to be alone with nature. This is the canyon I found in the surrounding area. Very calming view. [image: a photo of a river running through a canyon surrounded by mountains]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a river running through a canyon surrounded by mountains

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's so cool you had a similar experience. I bet you felt inspired seeing it in person.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Capturing that view was amazing. It was like connecting the real and the imaginary. It really sparked my creativity and motivation.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! What else gives you motivation?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I adhere to the principle that only those who rest well work well. Therefore, chilling with friends and traveling always give me motivation to work further.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I agree with you, I also love to travel. Last year I visited Italy, for example. A very beautiful country with delicious food.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Oh, Italy! I always dreamed of visiting there. What other countries have you been to?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: In fact, I haven't visited many countries. Besides Italy, I was also in Turkey and Mexico. What was the last country you visited?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This was Japan. The megacities of this country impress me, everything there is so technologically advanced, the huge screens on the buildings are mesmerizing. And, of course, very tasty street food. [image: a photo of a busy city street at night with people walking]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a busy city street at night with people walking

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It would be cool to go somewhere together next year, don't you think?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Of course, I hope everything works out for us, I will believe in it!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Great, then I'll start looking for a country where we can go!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Keep me posted, James! Let me know if you need help.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! How's it going?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Good to hear from ya. Yeah, been crazy. Last Thursday I took my dogs out for a hike. Was quite the adventure! Explored some nice trails and enjoyed fresh air.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, sounds like quite an adventure! Do you have any pictures from that day?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, I have one. It was great! They loved it - so many trails to discover and amazing views. So fun! [image: a photo of a man walking two dogs on a path in the woods]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man walking two dogs on a path in the woods

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that looks like a cool place you took them! Why'd you pick that spot?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I picked that spot because it had great views and lots of trails. It was perfect for them to explore nature and have fun. Plus, there's nothing like being surrounded by lush greenery and clean air.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Agreed! It is a great way to escape the everyday. Wish I could spend more time in nature!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Love hearing the crunch of leaves under my feet and the peacefulness. It helps me clear my head and chill.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I need some chill vibes too because it's been crazy for me lately.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: What's been going on? Is there anything you want to talk about? I'm here for you.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James. Yeah, been super busy at work. Deadlines all over the place and so much to do. It's just been really hectic lately.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, work can be tough. Is there something specific that's making it worse?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Ugh, this project is giving me a hard time. It's a difficult assignment that involves coding and I'm stuck on it. It's frustrating because I hate being stuck and not making progress.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, it's really frustrating when a project doesn't go as planned. What specifically is giving you trouble? Maybe I can offer some assistance.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This coding is really tough. I'm working on something complicated and it's not going well. I've been staring at it for ages and I feel like I'm getting nowhere.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Gotcha, what's the problem with the project? Need a hand figuring out some ideas?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, that'd be great. I'm trying to make this new algorithm work better, but I'm stuck. Do you have any ideas?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Not sure about your algorithm, but breaking it down into smaller steps might help. Doing some research on similar algorithms or asking other programmers for advice could be beneficial. Don't be afraid to seek help and remember, every problem has a solution.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yep, breaking it down into smaller steps and asking for help can definitely be helpful. I'll give it a try. Thanks for the advice, James. Much appreciated.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No problem John. Glad to help. You got this. Keep going and you'll find the answer.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Your words really helped. I won't quit. Gonna keep going. Cheers!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a quote written on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! What's up? Anything fun going on?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm currently taking on some freelance programming to hone my coding skills. It's challenging, but I'm determined to improve.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Freelancing can definitely be a great way to sharpen skills and gain experience. What projects are you currently working on?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm actually working on a website for a local small business. It's my first professional project outside of class.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Congrats on your first professional project, John! Bet it's been great applying what you learned in class. How's the progress been?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! I've learned a lot and it's been an interesting journey so far. Progress is slow and there have been some hiccups along the way.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, nothing ever goes smooth. It's normal to have hiccups, but use them to learn and grow. Push through it and you'll make it!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You're right, I appreciate the boost. It's tough sometimes but I'm gonna keep pushing and make this work. Hiccups won't stop me.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: What challenges have you encountered?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Figuring out how to get payments on the website was tough. I needed some help so I used some resources to understand the process. It's taken a while, but I'm getting closer to a solution.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That sounds challenging, but you're making progress. Hang in there! By the way, three days ago I bought myself an adventure book with fantasy novels and cool arts. [image: a photo of a person holding a book open to a picture of a male character]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a book open to a picture of a male character

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that art's awesome! It takes me back to reading fantasy books.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, I love this genre. Got any suggestions?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! Heard of "The Name of the Wind"? It's another great novel with awesome writing.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Never heard of it, but it sounds interesting. I'll definitely check it out. Thanks for the recommendation, John!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book set of three books on a wooden table

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Always happy to help. I'm sure you'll love this trilogy!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Look, I was playing a game and my faithful furry friend Daisy came and lay down next to me. This is so cute! [image: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with a computer in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with a computer in the background

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Awww, this is really so cute! Your furry friend looks so cozy. Do your dogs often come to you like this while playing?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, they love to watch me gaming and often hug me. Such good cuddle buddies! What game have you been playing lately?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a blue controller in their hand

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Awesome that you have them! I'm currently playing AC Valhalla, it's cool. Are you playing anything new?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! Valhalla is awesome. I'm trying out some strategy games like this. It's different but so cool! [image: a photo of a map of the world on a tv screen]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a map of the world on a tv screen

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Is that Civilization VI? Heard good things about it. How's it?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: This is a high-quality turn-based strategy game where you manage resources, lead armies, and conquer territories - challenging and cool! [image: a photo of a computer screen showing a game of war]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen showing a game of war

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That sounds fun! What's the game like? Does it require a lot of strategy?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure, John! It requires a lot of strategy. It's all about planning, managing resources and making good decisions to beat your rivals. Every move matters!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Sounds intense but cool. I like games that test my strategizing. Does it help with your problem-solving?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, it's a great way to work on problem-solving and thinking. Plus, it's awesome to see your plans go the way you wanted and win!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah! It's really satisfying when your plans work out and you win. How long have you been playing this game?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Been playing it for a month now - it's really challenged my strategy skills.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that's impressive! I'm really enjoying games like this, they really make me think. What do you think of strategy board games? I played one with friends two days ago, it's very exciting! [image: a photo of a board game with a lot of cards on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a board game with a lot of cards on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds good! Board games are always a blast when you hang out with friends.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah! They're great for having fun together.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Anything else that is fun to play with others?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yes, we played one game, but I forgot its name. Perhaps you know this game. There were multi-colored cards with numbers. You can only place a card with the same color or number on your opponent's card. Sometimes you trade cards, sometimes you need to draw a few extra from the deck or skip a turn.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I can't remember such a game. Maybe you have some other interesting games?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah for sure! I've been playing one more game with friends these days. It's a game to figure out who the impostors are and it's super fun.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds cool! I've heard of that game, been meaning to try it out.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Go for it, James! I advise you to gather a large group, it will be much more interesting to play.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure thing, sounds like fun.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That really is!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! How've you been? Had an eventful week since our last chat.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Man, it's been wild since we talked. Last Friday, something happened on my project that I've been working on for weeks. I got so close to finishing it but I just couldn't figure it out. Super frustrating.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Ugh, that's rough. I understand how frustrating it can be. What happened with that project of yours?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I hit a major snag - a bug in the code messed up the game mechanics. I tried debugging it for hours but couldn't solve it. It was super disappointing.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, dealing with those bugs can be frustrating. Did you manage to solve the issue?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Nah, I couldn't figure it out on my own so a group of friends and I teamed up and got it fixed. Took a bit of work, but I'm glad it got done.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! Having a reliable team can really make a difference.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, totally! It's awesome to have a group of people who share the same passions. They give you help and bring their own ideas to the mix. You can achieve so much when everyone works together. Are you working on anything today?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nah, I have day-off today. I had a few new friends over to watch some movies. Trying to socialize more and it's been great! I think it's important to balance work and enjoyment. You're welcome to join us next time!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds great, John! I'm definitely in next time. Hanging out with friends and unwinding is key. By the way, today I decided to spend time with my beloved pets again. [image: a photo of two dogs playing in a fenced in area]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two dogs playing in a fenced in area

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! They look like they're having a blast. What type are they?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: One of them, Daisy, is a Labrador. She loves to play with her toys, but most of all she loves to eat.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, what about the other two? Judging by the photo, shepherds?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Exactly! You would know how much joy they bring me. They are so loyal, and this is their main feature.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James! Love hearing about the joy that furry friends bring into your life. What else brings you happiness?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: My pets, computer games, travel and pizza are all that bring me happiness in life.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Pizza? Cool, I love pizza too! Which one do you love the most?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Pepperoni of course! An amazing combination of spicy salami and cheese.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, but my favorite thing is Hawaiian pizza. This combination of sweet and salty delights me! What other pizza do you like? [image: a photography of a pizza with pineapples and ham on a wooden board]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a pizza with pineapples and ham on a wooden board

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I like also cheese pizza and prosciutto.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Haven't tried prosciutto yet, but I've heard it`s great!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Give it a shot! It`s really great. No regrets, I promise.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Got it, will check it out. Thanks!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Be sure to tell us your impressions when you try it! And Bon Appetit!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks! Catch you later!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Been a while since we chatted. Sorry 'bout not getting back sooner. How's it going? Any new games you're into?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! No worries, I know you are really busy at work. I'm good, thanks for asking. Oh, I've been organizing something with my friends yesterday - it was cool! Guess what it was, I'll give you a little hint. [image: a photo of a wooden table with a game controller on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a wooden table with a game controller on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John, that looks awesome! Is it an icon of a new game?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nope, not a new game. We put together a tournament for our favorite game, CS:GO. Lots showed up and we made a bunch of money for charity!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow John, organizing that tournament for charity must have been a ton of effort, but it sounds like it was so worth it!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Definitely worth it! It took some planning and coordination, but seeing everyone come together for a good cause was so rewarding.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It must have been great to see the results of that effort. Have you considered organizing more events like that in the future?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, for sure! It was awesome and I want to do more events like that. It combines my interests and helps the community. Plus, it's great to get people together for some friendly competition.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Combining gaming and volunteering is a great idea! So fun and fulfilling. Where did you send the collected money?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Our main goal was to raise money for a dog shelter, which is not far from the street where I live. And we did it!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Helping animals is really important!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I agree. We still had some money left after helping the shelter, and we decided to use this money to buy groceries and cook some food for the homeless. They were very happy about it.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Glad you are helping those in need! You are doing a great job John, keep up the good work!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks for your support, James! I won't stop there, I will do more and more good things!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm really proud of you!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, it's been a bit since we last talked. Something cool happened recently - I volunteered my programming skills for a social cause. It was cool to use my passion to do something good. I made a software tool for one charitable foundation which helped streamline their operations and make them run more smoothly. Seeing my skills making a real difference in the world was really rewarding.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Glad to hear from you. It's awesome that you used your skills to make a difference. Bet it was cool to see it in action. Would love to hear more about it!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Previously, this foundation used paper records and all inventory was recorded manually. I made an application that structured their work, and now everything they need for inventory is in one application on their smartphone.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow John, that's awesome! Must feel great to be part of something so important. I would love to see any visual examples of the impact your software made.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, here's a screenshot of the system. It'll make tracking inventory, resources, and donations run smoother and generate reports for analysis. Feels great knowing my skills are making a real difference to them. [image: a photo of a computer monitor showing the cpu performance of a computer]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer monitor showing the cpu performance of a computer

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow John, that's awesome! What motivated you to create such an amazing system for them?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I was inspired by their passion for helping kids, so I wanted to contribute in any way I could. Plus, coding lets me challenge myself and expand my skills, so this was a great chance to do both. It's really rewarding to use my coding skills to make a difference.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's really great, John! It's awesome how you blended your passion with a good cause. How did it affect you?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It showed me the power of tech to make positive changes, beyond just my own enjoyment. It gave me a real sense of purpose.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Discovering our passions is truly rewarding. How do you think this experience will impact your future plans?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This experience has given me a clearer sense of purpose and motivated me to use my programming skills to make a positive impact. I'm now considering volunteer roles and potentially a career in the non-profit sector.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's really inspiring. Have you found any non-profit organizations that align with your values and passion for programming?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I haven’t found it yet, but to be honest I haven’t looked for it. I think it won’t be difficult for me to find the organization I need.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: There are lots of places where you can show off your skills! I'm sure you'll find one that's perfect for you in making a difference.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'll be happy to find a place where my skills and passions are a perfect match. I'm hoping to make a positive impact there.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm sure you'll find the right spot, John. Your skills and passions will be a great addition. Good luck!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, your encouragement means a lot.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm here for you. Good luck!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! Appreciate it. Take care and talk soon!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, last weekend I had an awesome time at the amusement park with my friends. It was a great break from the virtual world. I went on some awesome roller coasters and it reminded me of when I was a kid. Everything was so real and exciting; it felt like I was in a video game!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Sounds like an awesome time! I bet those rides brought back some great memories. Were there any other attractions besides the roller coaster?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course, I also managed to ride the Ferris wheel, electric cars and buggies. What's new with you?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's really cool! Last Friday I entered a local tournament and took second place! It was a wild experience and the competitive energy was insane.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John that's awesome! Congrats on your achievement! I can imagine the rush you must have felt during the tournament. Did you receive any rewards or prizes for your success?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I was stoked about my achievement. Though I didn't win the tournament, I still received some money for the 2nd place. Seeing my effort pay off was awesome.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Awesome news! You don't have to win every time, growth and progress are most important.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, I also got this trophy! So satisfying. It reminds me to always put in my best effort. What about you? Any success stories lately? [image: a photo of a graduation cap on a book with a rope]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a graduation cap on a book with a rope

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Congrats on your achievement, John! That trophy looks awesome. Last month, I had a personal milestone. There were definitely tough times, but it reminds me of all the hard work. I feel a huge sense of accomplishment and I'm ready for the future opportunities!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Congrats on the milestone. What was it and what made it challenging? What did you learn?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I finished a big project I had been working on for months. It was challenging because I had to learn a new language and handle many details. I learned a lot about problem-solving, patience, and perseverance. Now I feel more confident to take on even bigger projects.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's awesome you learned a language and handled all those details. Great job, you definitely picked up some great skills! Remember, determination and confidence make any project a success. Good work!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, I appreciate your support. I'll definitely keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No worries, I'm here to help. Keep going and reach those goals!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, long time no talk! A lot has happened during this time. Let me fill you in.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Awesome to hear from you. Yeah, a lot has happened. Let's catch up!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I finally got my dream job! After lots of interviews and late nights, I got the offer and was ecstatic. Can't wait to start my journey!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John! Congrats on getting your dream job. I'm super stoked for you. When do you start?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thank you! ! I'm starting next month.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It can be rough getting started, but I'm sure you'll do great. Don't be afraid to seek help if you need it. Can't wait to hear about your experience! By the way, I recently started a course that combines my passion for gaming and programming. It's fun and challenging, and it has definitely increased my excitement for both.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! That sounds awesome. Combining your love of gaming and coding sounds like a dream. Tell me more! Are there any interesting projects you're working on?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, we are currently working on a new part of the football simulator. I was working on collecting player databases. It wasn't easy, but I did it!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! Did you choose this course because you love football?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Not least because of this. I love football, but, of course, the most important reason is to improve yourself. But it’s nice if it’s also connected with something you like.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I completely agree! By the way, did you watch the Liverpool vs Chelsea match?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course, they played well! As I like to say, there is no sport better than football, no club better than Liverpool! I don't miss a single match of theirs!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It looks like you really root for this team!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Absolutely! They are forever in my heart, they are a great team. I hope they become champions next season!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: As a Manchester City fan, I can't agree with you. You'll see, our two teams will fight for the championship, and mine will win!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm sure you're wrong, John. Manchester City are in bad form and their transfer policy is terrible!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You may be right, but the City manager can handle it, you'll see!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I bet we'll be higher than you in the final standings!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'll take the bet, James! This will be a great battle!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure, John!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, how's it going? A lot has happened for me lately, some good and some not so great. I`m lucky to have at least two people who always help me out when I'm struggling. What about you?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on a person on a couch

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Gad to hear you have your support system ready. It's crucial, especially during hard times. For me, it's been quite an emotional rollercoaster. Last week, I started my blog about coding. It's exciting and kinda scary too. This is the first picture I uploaded there. [image: a photo of a computer screen with a program on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen with a program on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, starting a blog about coding is awesome! Must be so exciting. What do you think about it?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game scene of a man and woman

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! It has been an awesome and challenging experience. I'm loving sharing my coding journey with others and tracking everything. It's a great way to connect with other coders.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen showing a number of items

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Congrats on your coding journey! What`s more new in your world?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a vase with a plaque on it

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Well, I bought a lot of new books, and now my bookcase is almost completely filled! [image: a photo of a bookshelf with a lot of books on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bookshelf with a lot of books on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: What genre do you enjoy reading?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm a big fan of sci-fi and fantasy books. Epic fantasy series with immersive world-building and intricate storylines are what I enjoy reading. Just getting lost in the pages of a great story is a wonderful escape from reality. [image: a photo of a book shelf with a few books on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book shelf with a few books on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! Are there any book series that you love and would recommend to others?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Definitely! Two of my favorites are "The Stormlight Archive" and "Kingkiller Chronicle". If SF is your thing, check out "The Expanse" series. It's epic!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks for the recommendations, John! I'll definitely check out those books. What makes them your favorites?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cd with a picture of a knight on it

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Glad you're giving these books a try! I'm obsessed with the way they create a magical world you can escape into - plus the characters feel really real. By the way, what's the name of the dog in this picture from your Facebook? It`s so cute! [image: a photo of a dog sitting on a couch in a living room]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog sitting on a couch in a living room

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: This is Max – he's so lovable and playful. He brings me so much joy, especially in tough times. [image: a photo of a dog chewing on a shoe on a person's lap]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog chewing on a shoe on a person's lap

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Aww, he's adorable! I can tell Max brings you a lot of happiness. Pets are always such a great source of joy and love.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, Max is great - he always cheers me up when I'm feeling down. Enjoying those cuddles with him! [image: a photo of a dog standing in front of a pool]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog standing in front of a pool

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Does he enjoy swimming?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, he loves it! We usually hit the beach or lake, and he loves playing in the water. He's a pro swimmer!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Max must be having so much fun swimming and playing - it's the best!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: He has a blast! Always a joy to see him so happy and carefree in his favorite activity.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: He looks so happy - this is a great achievement of yours!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! I love making him happy.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog running in a field with a frisbee

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Does Max have any special talents? He seems like quite the go-getter!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Max is a real go-getter! He's awesome at catching frisbees in mid-air - never misses! [image: a photo of a dog laying in the grass with a frisbee]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying in the grass with a frisbee

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, Max loves playing fetch! Does he also enjoy long walks?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yep! We love them; they're great exercise and give us fresh air. Here is a photo of us from a recent walk in the forest. [image: a photo of a man walking a dog on a trail]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man walking a dog on a trail

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Where's that spot where you could take a stroll? Bet Max loves all those hikes.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Max and I love taking walks on this nearby trail. It's a mile from my house. It's so tranquil and a great way to relax and connect with nature. [image: a photo of a dirt path in a field with trees]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dirt path in a field with trees

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that looks awesome! Going for a nature walk is so refreshing, don't you think?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, John! It's so relaxing and refreshing. It helps me think straight and find my inner peace.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a park with a bench and trees in the fall

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That park is so peaceful. What do you do when you're there alone?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: When I'm there, I usually bring a book and just chill. It's like an escape from reality.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Sounds great, James! Taking breaks and switching up the scenery is a great way to feel recharged. Keep it up.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Definitely! Taking breaks is important for recharging. Thanks for the support!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No problem, always here to have your back. Take care of yourself!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, since our last chat, something awesome happened. Last Friday, I started introducing Max, Daisy and the new pup Ned. It was hard at first, but they're slowly adapting. It's sweet to watch them bond and have fun together.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that's cool, James! Seeing them bonding and having a great time is so sweet. Do you have a picture of them together?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yep, I got a great pic last night. Check it out! [image: a photography of three dogs in a field of grass with trees in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photography of three dogs in a field of grass with trees in the background

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, they look so cute! I can almost feel the love and joy in this photo. These last few days really got me thinking about my own future.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog and a cat cuddling on a couch

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: What's been on your mind regarding the future?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Lately, I've been thinking about my career and where I want to be in the future. I'm driven and passionate, and I also want to make a positive impact on the world.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Gotcha, John. Finding a way to make a difference matters. Have you thought about any ideas on how to do that?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, I have. I've been looking into volunteering and thinking of going into non-profit work. I want to put my passions and abilities to use for causes I really care about.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John that sounds great! I'm sure with your skills and passion, you could do some really cool things with nonprofits. Here's a pic I took when I volunteered last month. It was really rewarding to see how little gifts can do so much! [image: a photo of a group of people standing outside of a building]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people standing outside of a building

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's awesome, James! Was it cool to see the impact of the gifts? Can you tell me more about the organization you volunteered with?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It was great to see how much a simple act of kindness can mean to someone in need. I volunteered with an organization that provides necessary items to those who are less fortunate. It felt so rewarding to help, even if it was in a small way.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I think this is exactly what I need. Can you take me there this weekend?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a young boy standing outside of a yellow building

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course I can! I think there are still some of the previous staff there and I can even introduce you to them.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thank you very much! Will there be some kind of interview required?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No, this is not necessary. All you need is to be a friendly and polite person, and also have a great desire to help people. I'm sure you will succeed!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks for your support! I want to make this world a better place, and with your help I will definitely achieve my goal.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: We can do this together!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James. Your support means a lot to me. I'm determined to make a positive impact.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: You got this! Stay focused on your dreams and don't give up.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Long time no talk - hope you're doing well. Guess what? Last week I actually won an online gaming tournament! It was such an exciting experience and it blew my mind when I won. Winning felt so good and it really motivated me to keep improving.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Congrats on winning the online gaming tournament! It's super fulfilling to see your hard work pay off. So happy for you!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks! It was really fulfilling to see my hard work pay off with a victory in the tournament. How are you?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Feeling the tug of emotion lately. Determined and passionate on one hand, but feeling overwhelmed and stressed on the other. Balancing personal and professional is kind of a challenge. How have you been?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, staying balanced can be tough. I'm trying to take breaks from my hobbies and do other things. Lately I've become interested in extreme sports. Yesterday, for example, I was doing rope jumping. The highest height I jumped from was 150 meters!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, how cool! What other extreme sport have you tried?

turns.speaker: James
