turns.text: Just three days ago, I was surfing. Catching a wave is so cool! It's strange, but it relaxes me so much. How do you like to relax?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I like to relax by reading. I love entering the imaginative worlds of authors - it's a fun escape from reality. [image: a photo of a book shelf filled with books and a guitar]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book shelf filled with books and a guitar

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I also love to read, especially while snuggled under the covers on a cold winter day. But now it’s summer and I want something more exciting! By the way, I bought air tickets to Toronto, and I’m leaving the day after tomorrow evening.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, this is already the fourth country you will visit! Will you only be in Toronto, or will you be visiting somewhere else?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I also plan to visit Vancouver. Maybe, I'll go somewhere else.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: When are you coming back?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I plan to return on July 20, I’ll definitely bring you some kind of souvenir!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks James! I will be waiting for you from your journey! Bon Voyage!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thank you, John! Take care and see you soon!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Take care, bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hi James! I just started playing chess to get better at strategy. I'm loving it! Have you ever tried it out?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Yeah, I've played chess before. It's a game that really tests your strategy. It's great that you're enjoying it!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, chess is really fun! It's like solving an endless puzzle and always trying to outwit your opponent.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, it's tough, but fun when you figure it out. Do you play with friends or online?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm playing mostly online for now, but I also joined a chess club and practice with others. Here's a pic from an intense game I played lately. [image: a photo of a chess board with a laptop on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a chess board with a laptop on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, looks intense! What sparked your interest in chess?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I've always been drawn to strategy games and wanted to challenge myself. Plus, I believe chess can improve decision-making skills.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Great reason for playing chess - it will definitely help you develop your skills!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! I'm excited to see how playing chess can enhance my strategic thinking in everyday situations. Do you have any tips for improvement?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Definitely! Studying opening moves and strategies and analyzing your games to spot weaknesses are great ways to improve.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'll definitely look into that. Appreciate the advice!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No worries, John! Happy to help. Just let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Your support means a lot to me. You're a true friend! Remember this photo from elementary school? [image: a photo of a group of children holding a skateboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of children holding a skateboard

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That looks fun. But I don’t remember at all under what circumstances we took this picture. What's the story behind it?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This is from when we were 10 and we were really into skateboarding. We had a group of friends who often go to the skate park with. We would help each other learn new tricks and have a great time. Those friends made the experience even better and their friendship meant a lot to us.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Indeed, I remember this moment. We loved skateboards back then, sometimes we even left class early to do it. I still like to go for a ride sometimes, and I even taught my dogs how to balance on it. [image: a photo of a small dog standing on a skateboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a small dog standing on a skateboard

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow! Do they enjoy it, or do you have to encourage them to play with the board?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: They love it! They chase after it and run with it. It's a great way for them to get some exercise.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that's great! Keeping active and happy is great for both of you.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yep! Staying active with them builds a strong bond and makes us both happy.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, the bond between us and our pets is amazing. They bring a lot of joy and love. It’s a pity that I don’t have pets, I’ll definitely get one someday. By the way, how was your trip?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cat laying on a bed with a stuffed animal

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Everything went great! In addition, I even managed to get out to another country. The city of Nuuk, if you know. I stayed there quite a bit, but at least I had one more country to add to my bucket list!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This is awesome, James! Surely you brought a lot of impressions with you!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Certainly! And not only impressions, I also brought souvenirs. For both you and your Jill!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thank you very much, Jill will be delighted!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: You're welcome! By the way, look who came to see me! [image: a photo of a woman and two dogs on a couch]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman and two dogs on a couch

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nice pic, James! Who are they?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's my sister and my dogs. We were just chilling together yesterday, and they bring so much happiness to my life.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, they look so happy! It's awesome that you get to spend time with your sister and your furry friends. The bond you have with them is really strong.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm blessed to have a close bond with my sister and our furry friends. We have a great time together, like a family!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Family and friends are really amazing, James. They show us so much love and joy. I'm grateful for the connection I have with my siblings. Things can be tough sometimes, but their support means everything to me.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Fully agreed! My sister and I were also near the ocean and watched such a wonderful sunset! [image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wonderful photo! It's amazing how you can capture a moment and capture it in a photograph.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! This is just a good shot, nothing more. I took a lot of shots yesterday and chose the best one to send to you.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Still, the photo is amazing!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I have to go, I'm tired over the last two days. Bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Take care, bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, good catching up! Been a while huh? I made a huge call - recently left my IT job after 3 years. It was tough but I wanted something that made a difference. And now with this new job, I am happy about my decision. I am loving the new job!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Great to hear from you. Leaving after 3 years is a big step - how did it feel?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: At first, it was super scary, but I knew I had to make a change and focus on things that align with my values and passions.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John, that sounds really brave. I hope it brings you joy and satisfaction.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James. It wasn't easy, but sometimes you gotta take a leap to follow your heart.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Taking risks pays off! Way to be brave. I'm proud of you!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Your support means a lot. Lately, I've been thinking about what truly makes me happy, and I'm really drawn to the gaming industry. I'm passionate about it and it's time to turn that into a career. I want to become an organizer of tournaments for various computer games in our state. For example, for CS:GO. It's a new journey for me.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! You always mentioned your love for gaming. What other game do you want to organize competitions for? And what`s your plan now?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Also, I can host Fortnite competitions. I have already made some connections that will help me with this. My plan is to gain more experience and perfect my skills to be successful in this field.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds like a solid plan! Trying out different game genres can be a great way to widen your skills and knowledge.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks! I am very glad that you support me in my new endeavor!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I will always be here for you! If you need any financial assistance or advice, please contact me!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I will definitely do this if necessary! By the way, what's new with you?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yesterday I took my puppy to the clinic.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: God, James, what happened to your puppy? Is it OK?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Don't worry. This was just a routine examination. Also, the puppy was vaccinated to prevent him from catching the seasonal canine disease.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Phew, great that he's okay. It's great that you care so much about your pets!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: They are the source of my joy, so I will always take care of them!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You're a great host, James! Well, I have to go, bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! Take care, bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, been a few days. The convo got me thinking about my passions and goals. Thanks for encouraging me to try new game genres.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Nice to hear from you! Glad our chat made an impact. What sort of games are you interested in exploring?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Lately, I've been playing some different genres like strategy and RPG games instead of my usual shooters. I’m already thinking about making competitions for them too.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's great, John! Trying out different genres can really add to your gaming experiences. Have you come across any standout games?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hooked a new RPG that I've been playing lately! The storytelling and characters are amazing, can't get enough of it.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds great! I think storytelling is what makes RPGs so fun. What game are you playing? Do you have any favorite characters?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm playing "The Witcher 3"! There's this awesome monster hunter with a cool story, and I'm totally hooked, trying to make the right choices to shape the world. It's really immersive.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, "The Witcher 3" is amazing! I love how you can shape the world with your choices and feel the impact. The graphics are insane too - check out this pic. [image: a photo of a man dressed in armor holding a sword]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man dressed in armor holding a sword

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's a great pic! The graphics are truly stunning! By the way, look how I organized my workplace! [image: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! Wall lighting adds beauty to your workspace.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks James! What's new with you?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yesterday I took my three dogs to a beach outing to have fun and bond with other dogkeepers.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! Surely you gained a new experience from communicating with other dog lovers!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a refrigerator with a calendar on it and a magnet

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, we had fun and I even met one beautiful girl. I'm thinking of asking her out on a date! She left me her phone number, I think I'll call tomorrow.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow! That's cool, what's her name? Be sure to call her, everything will work out!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: She is Samantha. I'll definitely call her!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yoohoo! Hope you have a wonderful time!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey, James! Good to hear from you. I have some awesome news - I joined a programming group online last Friday and it's been incredible! It's awesome to be part of a community of people with similar goals - coding and making a difference.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! That's great to hear! Being part of a coding community can definitely be rewarding. Can you share more about your experiences with the online group? Have you made any interesting connections?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks for asking. My online programming group has been great - lots of skilled coders, all passionate about using tech for good. We've shared ideas, chatted about coding and worked on a few projects together. It's amazing to see everyone's different skills and viewpoints. I've even exchanged contacts with a few of them.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Nice one, John! Looks like you're really getting involved in the programming world. It's great connecting with like-minded people and building up your network. Have you had the opportunity to collaborate on any projects or work with anyone yet?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, collaborating is great. Last week I worked with someone from the group on a project and we both had our strong points which helped out. It was cool seeing how we created something awesome together. It's great working with others.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Working together on a project can create amazing results, when everyone brings in their different strengths and abilities. It's cool when the final product is done and you know you were a part of making something awesome. Can we say that you are returning to working with programming again?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I think not, this is just a one-time experience to learn something new and work as a team. I'm still full of courage to start hosting eSports competitions. Do you participate in any online groups?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Nah, not in any online groups right now, but I do have my gaming group I play with regularly. We even stream our game sessions, and recently had a get-together. Super fun! [image: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James! That's great that you have some friends to game with. By the way, I bought some new devices and refurbished my gaming desk. [image: a photo of a desk with a computer and a keyboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer and a keyboard

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! What kind of gear do you have now for gaming? I have a setup with a gaming PC, keyboard, mouse, and a comfy chair - makes gaming for hours a lot more bearable! [image: a photo of a gaming desk with a computer and a gaming chair]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a gaming desk with a computer and a gaming chair

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nice set-up, James! I have a similar gaming chair and keyboard. I'm currently using a gaming PC with a powerful graphics card for intense games. I also have a headset for immersive sound. Gaming has always been an awesome escape for me - it keeps me focused and motivated in other areas.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Nice one! A strong graphics card and headset really enhance the gaming experience. Yeah, gaming is a great way to escape and stay motivated. It takes us to different places and stories. I even hosted a gaming marathon with some friends and we had a blast. We played all night and it really strengthened our bond. [image: a photo of a family sitting on a couch in a living room]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a family sitting on a couch in a living room

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Sounds great! Gaming marathons are the best. When I was younger, my siblings threw me one and it was awesome! We stayed up all night playing games and it really bonded us.
turns.image_caption: a photo of two children sitting on a couch with a baby

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that sounds awesome! Do you still play with your siblings these days?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Me and my siblings don't hang out much since we live far apart, but when we do we always try to plan a gaming night.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds great, John! Family time is the best. Are you planning any gaming nights in the near future?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yep, I'm organizing one with my siblings next month. We're stoked! Can't wait!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John! Family game nights are so much fun. Have a great time!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! Can't wait! It was nice catching up - talk soon!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Good to talk to you. Have fun at family game night! Talk to you later.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! Gonna have a great time. Talk to you later.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Take it easy. Have fun and let's chat soon. Have a good night!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Look how cute it is. My dog came to me today while I was playing on the console. What is new? [image: a photo of a person holding a dog on a couch]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a dog on a couch

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Your pup is so cute, remind me what's their name? I've been helping my younger siblings out with programming since they joined the programming course. It's really cool to see them get into it.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: His name's Ned and he's been awesome since I adopted him. I can't imagine life without him. It's great to hear that your siblings signed up for programming.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's right, his name is Ned, how could I forget?!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Regarding your siblings, are you already working on anything cool with them?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah! We're working on a cool project together that involves coding. It's a game and it's helping them learn.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, learning and gaming sounds like a fantastic combination for coding education! Can you share more details about the game?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, they're playing a simple, text-based adventure game, working on their coding skills and having fun. I'm so proud of them! Maybe they'll even create their own video games, huh? Any new game designs on your mind?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, sounds cool John! Learning coding with a text-based adventure game is impressive stuff. As for me, I've been trying out different genres of games and now I'm dying to create a strategy game like Civilization - love how complicated and in-depth they are. Fingers crossed, one day I'll make my own awesome strategy game!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James, that's impressive! It's gonna be awesome. Can't wait to see what you come up with!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Are you free tomorrow?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yes, tomorrow is my day off. Do you have any suggestions on how to spend tomorrow?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, we can go to Starbucks for coffee if you want.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a laptop computer with a colorful keyboard on a table

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I don't mind meeting up, but why Starbucks? Maybe we can have a beer somewhere?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Well, how about we go to McGee's pub then? I heard they serve a great stout there!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Great idea, except I don't like dark beer. Maybe there's something else there?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course, there are also light beers!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Great, then I agree! See you tomorrow at McGee's Pub!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: See you John, bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Been a while, but hope you're doing well. My Unity strategy game is finally finished—it took loads of time and effort, but I'm really proud. Your support and encouragement made a real difference. Thanks for believing in me! [image: a photography of a screenshot of a stone building with a giant creature]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a screenshot of a stone building with a giant creature

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Congrats on finishing your game! It looks amazing and I'm so proud of you for all the hard work you put in. Can I see more of it? Got any other screenshots to show me?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I appreciate your support. Check out this screenshot from it. [image: a photo of a video game screen showing a person on a horse]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game screen showing a person on a horse

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This game looks great! What inspired you to create it?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I've always loved playing strategy games like Civilization and Total War, so I decided to challenge myself and create one of my own.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's awesome! I love those games too. It must have been quite an experience making your own. Did you face any difficulties during development?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It was a bit challenging to get everything right, balancing mechanics and ensuring fairness. But with some trial and error, I managed to get it to where I wanted it.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that must have been a challenge, especially since you had to make sure the game was enjoyable and balanced. Congratulations on completing it! What were some key takeaways from the experience?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! It was definitely a learning experience. Perseverance and patience are key, and I'm proud of what I created after sticking with it. Also, feedback and collaboration are essential, and the help from others really made the game better. It was great!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Awesome that you learned those lessons! Collaboration and feedback make a huge impact on any project. I've been teaching my siblings coding. It's been a fulfilling experience and they're already creating their own programs - amazing!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John! Cool seeing others learn with your help. What kind of programs are they making?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: They're starting small, making basic games and stories. It's inspiring how fast they learn and the good time they're having.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow! It's inspiring how fast they learn and the good time they're having. I bet they'll be creating their own complex projects soon!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm excited to see how far they can go! With their passion for video games like me, hopefully they can use those coding skills to make something cool. I'm so proud of them, can't wait to see what they come up with!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm proud of them too! Seeing the next generation pick up coding and making their own games is awesome. Can't wait to see what they create!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James, for the support. I really appreciate it.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, you're the best! I'm here for you, no doubt.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Your friendship really means a lot. I'm going through some difficult times now and it's really good to know I've got someone like you.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Just know I'm here if you need someone to talk or vent to. It might help alleviate some of the difficult times you're going through.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, it's been a few days since we talked. So much has gone on, both good and bad. Yesterday, when we were at the theater, Samantha loves theater, I asked her to become my girlfriend, and she agreed. We have gone through a lot in this short period. There were good and bad, but I'm happy with her. All that ups and downs were a bit overwhelming, but it's part of life. What about you? Anything interesting lately?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, this is great news! Where else have you been besides the theater? My parents just started learning coding from me - it's been a learning experience, but I'm glad to help them out. It binds us a little closer. Look at this photo, this is my father coding his own program for the first time. [image: a photography of a man sitting at a desk with a computer]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a man sitting at a desk with a computer

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's great, John! Looks like he's having a good time in the pic. Samantha and I were also at McGee's bar. It turned out that she loves a good lager beer. She and I have so much in common!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm glad you finally found someone other than dogs that brings you joy. Well done, you will succeed!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John. She and I are going to a baseball game next Sunday, want to join? I'll show you what Samantha looks like.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah! Let's do it. It'll be a fun experience!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Great. Well, what else is new in your life?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I bought some new gaming equipment to improve my skills. For example, new headphones.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool, which company did you choose? And what other devices did you buy?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I chose headphones from Sennheiser. Judging by the reviews, they have excellent sound. Also, I bought a mouse from Logitech.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! I hope the new devices will improve your skill and you will play even better!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game scene of a couple of people

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I really hope so too. Well, do you have anything new besides the great news about you and Samantha?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, two days ago I signed up for a cooking class. I never liked cooking, but I felt that I wanted to learn something new. At the first lesson we prepared several simple dishes. I got a great omelette the first time!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! I’ve never heard of your desire to cook, you surprise me! How much do these cooking courses cost and what else did you cook there?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: At only $10 per class, it's very cheap! Also, I made meringue there and they taught us how to make the dough.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Really cheap. It's great that you are always looking for a way to improve yourself!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks for your support, John! I really appreciate it. I hope I can treat you to my creation once I learn a little more about cooking.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I look forward to it, James, you can do it!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Your words give me even more strength to pursue my new hobby!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: That's why we are friends, to support each other! Well, I have to go, bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Take care, John, bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Long time no see! A lot's changed since we talked. I started getting into board games. I tried one last week and it turned out to be a lot of fun. What's new with you? [image: a photo of a table with a laptop and a game on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a table with a laptop and a game on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Cool, what kind of board game is this? I had a lot to do all this time. And in order not to forget to do something, I started writing down everything I needed in a notebook. [image: a photo of a notebook with writing on it sitting on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with writing on it sitting on a table

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: This game is called "Dungeons of the Dragon", very exciting! I'm really glad you're writing down what you need to do in a notebook. This will definitely help you not to forget anything! How did you come up with this idea? In general, where do you get ideas?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! I get them from various sources like books, movies, and even dreams.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, dreams have inspired you? That's interesting. Have any specific dreams guided your ideas?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: A few weeks ago I had this crazy dream that led to some creative ideas. It was so vivid I woke up with some interesting thoughts!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, dreams can be so awesome! Are there any specific details you remember from that one?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I remember there was a medieval castle with its own labyrinth full of puzzles and traps. It felt like playing a video game in real life!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, exploring a castle with puzzles and traps sounds awesome! Have you got any sketches or notes from that experience? I'd love to take a look!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yep! I made some sketches and notes. Hang on, let me grab them. [image: a photo of a notepad with a drawing of a guitar]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a drawing of a guitar

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nice sketch! Do you like music, or is it related to your castle dream?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks! Music is a big part of my life - nothing to do with castles though. What kind of music do you like? Do you play any instruments? [image: a photo of a desk with a laptop, headphones, and a monitor]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a laptop, headphones, and a monitor

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! I'm into electronic and rock music. I used to play drums when I was younger, but haven't in a while. Do you play any instruments?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, rock's awesome! I used to play a guitar when I was younger but haven't in a while.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Playing drums when I was younger was a fun way to let off steam. Here's a photo of an old drum set I used to play on. [image: a photo of a drum set up in a recording studio]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a drum set up in a recording studio

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! Have you ever been in a band or just jammed with friends?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I've jammed with friends before, it was a lot of fun!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sounds awesome! Jamming with friends is always a blast. Do you have any recordings or videos of those sessions?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Nah, it was more about the experience and the moment. No recordings or videos from the jams.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No problem! It's nice to just enjoy the experience without worrying about collecting videos or recordings. By the way, I started streaming games. No details yet, I hope everything works out.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'll keep my fingers crossed for you! You will definitely succeed, I look forward to the details!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James, been a few days since we chatted. Lots of stuff goin' on in my life!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! What new has happened in your life?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yesterday I started a new startup - portable smokers. Now, I’ve already welded one from metal. Do you think it looks good? How about you, any cool stuff happening? [image: a photo of a fire burning in a metal pot on a street]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a fire burning in a metal pot on a street

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, that looks great! Seeing it makes me think of campfires with pals. Last night I streamed a game and wow, was I blown away by all the nice comments from the gaming community. I felt so stoked and inspired to keep going.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Woohoo, congrats James! That's awesome. Sounds like you're doing well. All your hard work is paying off, so keep it up!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a card with a graduation cap on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks for the support, John! This made me think of such an exciting time. Any more big moments recently?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I just achieved a major career milestone - making my first mobile game! It's launching next month. [image: a photography of a demonic demon flying in the air with a sword]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a demonic demon flying in the air with a sword

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Way to go, John! Congrats on achieving that major career milestone. Could you tell me more about it? Why didn’t you say before that you were creating a mobile game?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks James! I kept it a secret because I would have been very upset if I had told you about her in advance and then it wouldn't have worked out. I've been working on this for the past few months and I'm really proud of how it's turned out. It's a 2D adventure game with puzzles and exploration. Here's a screenshot. [image: a photography of a video game with a bunch of different screens]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a video game with a bunch of different screens

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: John, this sounds great! I'm into 2D adventures with puzzles - like The Legend of Zelda. Can I see it or help with testing it out?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cheers, James! Appreciate your offer to help. I'll definitely let you know when the testing is ready. By the way, here is the book that helped me create the puzzles for this game. [image: a photo of a book with a cartoon of a man playing a game]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book with a cartoon of a man playing a game

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that book looks great! What other resources do you use to improve your game? Tell me about your gaming tips!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It is filled with awesome tips and insights on game design. I also watch tutorials and keep up with developer forums for information and ideas. Basically, staying informed and constantly learning is key!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: You're really dedicated to improving and staying up to date. It's inspiring to see how you stay informed and keep learning. I also advise you to read this magazine, which is also a worthy source of information. Keep up the good work! [image: a photo of a magazine with a picture of a cartoon character]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a magazine with a picture of a cartoon character

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I read it, too. This magazine has been great for me too. Tutorials, interviews with developers, and tips - all really helpful.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John! Glad that resource was useful - looks like it provides some good tips and tricks for game developers.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a magazine with a picture of a cartoon character

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, that magazine looks great! Have you also found it to be a good resource?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course! It's been great, filled with tutorials and developer interviews to help improve my game dev skills. Super useful!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Resources like that are great for improving our skills. Keep it up! How's your week been?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: My week's been good. Just trying to find a balance between work and other activities. How about you, how's your week going?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: As for me, this week has been chaotic with everything going on. But I'm powering through!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sorry to hear about your busy week, John. Make sure to take some time for yourself and take care. You've got this!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I appreciate your help. Gonna make time for myself.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: No worries, take care of yourself. Relax and recharge - you deserve it.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, man! I'll definitely take your advice. You're the best!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Busy few weeks for sure, but I'm pushing through. Got an email about a volunteer gig at a game dev non-profit. It's something I've wanted to do for a while, and could be the perfect start to a career that combines my two loves - gaming and helping. So stoked!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, that sounds awesome! Combining your two loves - gaming and helping people - must be really exciting! So what kind of gig did they offer you?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: They asked me to be a programming mentor for game developers. I'll be teaching coding and assisting with projects. I'm really excited to share my knowledge and motivate people who are passionate about gaming.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, John! Mentoring programmers to make games sounds awesome! You must love it. How do you feel about starting this journey?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm so excited and inspired! It's a great chance to help them and boost my own skills. I love sharing what I know and seeing others reach their potential - it's so rewarding!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It's so rewarding to see how much joy you get from it. Keep going, you're doing great!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, James! Your support really means a lot. It's so fulfilling to use my skills to make a difference. I hope this opens more opportunities for me.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm sure it will lead to great things. You got this! Oh, and I got this cool video card last week - I'm so excited to jump into it again! [image: a photo of a computer case with a red light on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer case with a red light on it

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool, James! What kind of games are you excited to play on it?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm super into RPGs, so I'm excited about getting this video card and playing some new games. Have you heard any great things about Cyberpunk 2077? Do you think this game is worthy of my attention?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, I played it - it's awesome! Such an immersive world and an amazing story. I'm sure you'll love it!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm so excited for it! The world and story sound perfect. Thanks for recommending it, John!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No worries, James! Hope you have a blast playing. Let me know what you think!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool, John. Will do! Take care, see ya!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Take care! Enjoy that new computer. Later!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! How's it going? I had a blast last week when my programmer friends and I organized an online comp. It was awesome to see everyone show off their skills! Anything new in your life? [image: a photo of a desk with a laptop and a monitor]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a laptop and a monitor

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, congrats! Something cool happened to me recently. I made my first game and released it for the gaming community - it was so exciting! [image: a photography of a game of thrones with a dragon and a dragon]
turns.image_caption: a photography of a game of thrones with a dragon and a dragon

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Congrats on releasing your game, James! Was it fulfilling to see players engage with the game world you created?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: It was so fulfilling to see players engage with the game world I created. I'm really happy they're having fun with something I put so much work into.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: So cool that people are enjoying it! What inspired you to create it?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Playing video games was always great, but creating my own game was really special. Witcher 3 gave me a ton of inspiration, with its amazing world and story. Plus, it pushed me to create something cool.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: The Witcher 3 obviously had a huge impact on you. You must have put a ton of hard work and dedication into your game. Do you have any plans for future game development?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I put in so much effort and it paid off - now, I'm ready to make more games in different genres and test out new ideas. I'm pumped to see where this journey leads!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I can't wait to see where your journey leads and the new creations you come up with. Your determination and love for game development is incredible. Keep going and you'll do great things!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'm really looking forward to creating more enjoyable experiences!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm here for you. Anything you need, count on me!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! Your support is really appreciated.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No worries, James! We make a good team.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, totally. You've always been there for me, John. Thanks for having my back.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, long time no talk! So much has happened!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! I'm excited to catch up. What's been up lately?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Three days ago my apartment lost power - so annoying because I had just gotten to the big reveal in that game! Had to wait hours before playing again.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Ugh, that stinks! Losing power in the middle of a game is such a bummer. Did it mess up your progress?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Oof, it definitely messed up my progress. I lost some of it because I forgot to save. Frustrating, but now I know to save more often!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Lesson learned - save progress! By the way, I organized the programming seminar last week.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, cool! How did it go? Did you learn anything cool?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: The seminar went really well! We had a great turnout and I learned some interesting new things. It was a fulfilling experience to share my knowledge and see how it benefited the group.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's great, John! Sounds like the seminar went well. What did you learn from it?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I gained insight into various programming approaches and techniques. It was interesting to hear other developers' ideas and strategies.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Learning new programming stuff is great. Did you find any ideas that you'll incorporate into your own work?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah! Found some cool ideas that I can use in my own work. It's exciting to explore different programming techniques and how to implement them.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool, John! Broadening your programming skills and trying new techniques is great - keeps things exciting and helps you develop. Have you had a chance to try them out yet?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No, I haven't tried them yet. But I'm looking forward to experimenting and seeing what I can do with them. It's always fun to try new things!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah! Trying new stuff keeps us on our toes and helps our creativity. Awesome that you're down to experiment and see what you can come up with. I'm looking to branch out as well, any ideas I could check out?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'll send you some resources and tutorials on the new programming approaches and techniques I learned. You'll find them cool!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Appreciate it. Can't wait to check them out, and maybe learn something new!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No worries, James. I hope they help. Let me know if you have any questions.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'll reach out if I need help. Thanks for the resources, really appreciate it. By the way, my mother came to see me with her army friend two days ago. We had fun. [image: a photo of a man and woman in military clothing standing next to a dog]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man and woman in military clothing standing next to a dog

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool. Mother's friend must still be in the army?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yes, she is still serving. But she retired a long time ago. They used to tell me stories about their time in the military and their pup. Funny enough, I have a pic of me at their age playing on their old gaming setup. Would you like to see it?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, James! Show me that picture of you playing on their old gaming setup, it looks like a blast!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Here is a photo of this console with the game Mario. Funny gamepad, isn't it? [image: a photo of a nintendo game console and a nintendo mario game controller]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a nintendo game console and a nintendo mario game controller

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Oh yeah, that`s funny! Did you have fun with Nintendo when you were a kid?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Oh yeah! I had a blast with it when I was a kid. It was my first gaming system and I'd play Super Mario and The Legend of Zelda for hours. It totally sparked my passion for gaming.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, James! Those games really sparked your passion for gaming, didn't they?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Those games introduced me to gaming and I've been hooked ever since. By the way, yesterday I tried Cyberpunk 2077. Great game, so addictive!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a video game cover of the witcher wild hunt

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm really glad you're enjoying this game. There will be so many unexpected turns in it, you can’t even imagine!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: What do you think is the most difficult thing about this game?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: The most difficult thing is to make the right choice. After all, even from the choice of lines in dialogues with characters, everything can go wrong. The choices here can be life-changing! [image: a photo of a man in a leather vest and a belt]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man in a leather vest and a belt

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thank you very much, I will definitely keep this in mind!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: And remember, you don't have to be friends with every character in this game. I don't want to spoil it, but just remember this!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I'll definitely take your advice, John! Thank you for avoiding spoilers.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Always happy to help. Well, I have to go! Bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Take care, bye!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Hope you're doing great. I've some amazing news - I held a gaming tourney with my buddies last night. We played Fortnite and a few other games. We raised a decent amount for a children's hospital. Combining gaming and a good cause felt awesome!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Awesome job organizing a gaming tournament for a children's hospital! Combining gaming and a good cause - that's really cool! Tell me more about who helped out and what other games were played.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks! We all pulled together for a great cause. My gaming pals and I also played Overwatch and Apex Legends. Everyone had a blast raising money for the kids' hospital. The atmosphere was awesome and everyone was so competitive. In the end, we raised a good amount. Feels good to use our love of gaming for good!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that sounds like a blast! It's great how gaming can bring people together like that. You made a huge difference in the kids' lives! Do you have any photos from the tournament?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I got a great shot at the tournament. Check it out! Everyone was so hyped, and it felt great knowing we were playing for a good cause. [image: a photo of a computer screen with a game menu on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen with a game menu on it

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, this photo rocks!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks! I'm glad you enjoyed it. It was a really awesome moment - unforgettable for all of us! What's new with you?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I actually have something new, Samantha and I have decided to move in together!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Wow, that's a really big decision! I hope you both have weighed the pros and cons. Where are you going to live?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Of course, this was a mutual and informed decision. We rented an apartment not far from McGee's bar.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You love spending time together in this bar, don't you?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: We just love it! I’ll be honest, one of the criteria for our choice of apartment was this particular bar nearby.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Awesome, James! Excited to hear how it goes. Keep me posted and good luck!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks, John! I'll be sure to keep you updated. I really appreciate your support. Take care!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: No worries! I'm here for you whenever you need. Stay safe and chat soon!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks! Appreciate your support. Stay safe and talk to you soon!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man and two dogs running in a field

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John, hope you're doing well. Yesterday, we started on a road trip. It was fun spending time with the family and my dogs. Exploring new places and taking in nature with the furballs was awesome!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! Wow, what an adventure! Lately, I've been busy with something. Guess what? I had a great accomplishment this Tuesday! It was awesome.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's great news. What did you do?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I won the regional chess tournament. It was intense but I came out on top!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That's awesome! Congrats! How did it feel to come out on top?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: It felt so good. All my hard work and practice paid off and it was great to conquer the challenges. It gave me a huge confidence boost. So proud of myself!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Winning must have felt so good. What was it like when you won? What strategies did you use to get ready?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: My strategy involved analyzing and anticipating my opponent's moves to stay one step ahead.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Cool! It's all about studying the game to gain the edge. Do you have any tips for improving?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, studying opening moves and strategies can really help. It sets the tone and builds a strong foundation. Learning from experienced players and analyzing past games is important too. Plus the chess advice you gave me earlier also helped. Would you like some resources on chess openings?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Sure, I'd love to check out some resources on chess openings. Thank you!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I've got you covered on that. Here's a helpful resource for chess openings. Happy to help! [image: a photo of a book with a list of the different games]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book with a list of the different games

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Thanks for the suggestion, John. What games are you currently playing? I'm always looking for new recommendations.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I'm hooked on this great game called FIFA 23. This is a great football game with the ability to play online with other players from all over the world! Enjoy!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Wow, that sounds awesome! I just wanted to try a new gaming genre, so why not try the sports genre.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You need to practice a little first, and then we can play together.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Great idea! I hope it's easy to control.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Not at all, all you need is a gamepad and a sense of timing.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Great! Well, I'll go train!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Hey John! Guess what? Me and my family are currently on the road trip! We`ve already visited my friends Josh and Mark and had such a great time! [image: a photo of a group of people posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people posing for a picture

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Hey James! That sounds awesome! I had a super fun weekend - I worked with a game developer on a project and it was great to see my ideas come to life. It was an incredible experience! [image: a photo of a wooden board game with four pieces of wood and four pieces of colored balls]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a wooden board game with four pieces of wood and four pieces of colored balls

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: That sounds amazing. What was the project you worked on?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: I collaborated with a game developer to create an online board game - it's a fun and unique experience!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: I can imagine how proud you must feel seeing your ideas come to life in a game. Has it been released for others to try yet?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: We're about to release a demo soon so others can try it out. Can't wait for their feedback and suggestions.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Can't wait to try it. Keep me posted when it's out - I wanna support you and give my thoughts.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Appreciate your support. I'll definitely let you know when it's out and I'm really excited to hear your thoughts.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: By the way, we did one good thing on the way to Mark and Josh.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: What is this? Looking forward to hearing your story!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: We visited an animal sanctuary on the road trip - there were so many cute rescue dogs! I thought of our love of furry pals. [image: a photo of a man kneeling down next to a dog]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man kneeling down next to a dog

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Cool! What was it like visiting the animal sanctuary? Did you feel tempted to bring any furry pals home?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Those rescue dogs were so cute, I wanted to take them all home, but I remembered that I already have three dogs at home. I think having more than three dogs is too much.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: You are right! I still haven’t gotten a dog, but I still really want one. What is it like to have a dog?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Having furry friends around brings so much joy and friendship. Life wouldn't be the same without them. Every day's better with them around.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yep, they bring so much joy and love. They're always there for us! It's like having sunshine on a cloudy day.

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: My dogs are like that too - they even make dark days better. Don't know what I'd do without them. They're the best buddies.

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Yeah, dogs are awesome for sure! They make us feel so loved and cheerful, don't they?

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Yeah, they definitely do. Dogs always cheer us up, wagging their tails and giving us unconditional love. It's like having a dose of positivity and happiness every day. They're amazing!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Definitely, James! Dogs are amazing. They bring so much joy and positivity. They accept us without judgement, just love and happiness. I appreciate the daily dose of positivity they bring to my life. Special buddies for sure. By the way, here is my cousin's dog. [image: a photo of a dog sitting on a rug in front of a couch]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dog sitting on a rug in front of a couch

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: This pup is so adorable! What's their name?

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Their name is Luna. [image: a photo of two people standing in front of a giant head]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two people standing in front of a giant head

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Luna's a great name!

turns.speaker: John
turns.text: Thanks, gonna go, sorry. Cheers! Bye!

turns.speaker: James
turns.text: Later! Take care!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, nice to meet you! How's your week going? Anything fun happened?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hi Deb! Good to meet you! Yeah, my week's been busy. I finished an electrical engineering project last week - took a lot of work, but it's done now. Anything fun happening for you?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Congrats! Last week I visited a place that holds a lot of memories for me. It was my mother`s old house.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Why does it hold such special memories for you?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It was full of memories, she passed away a few years ago. This is our last photo together. [image: a photo of a woman in a wheelchair hugging a woman in a wheelchair]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman in a wheelchair hugging a woman in a wheelchair

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sorry about your loss, Deb. My mother also passed away last year. This is my room in her house, I also have many memories there. Is there anything special about it you remember? [image: a photo of a room with a bench and a window]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a bench and a window

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: My mom's house had a special bench near the window. She loved to sit there every morning and take in the view. I come to sit here sometimes, it helps me stay connected to her.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Staying connected is super important. Do you have something to remember her by? This pendant reminds me of my mother, she gave it to me in 2010  in Paris. [image: a photo of a heart shaped pendant with a bird on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a heart shaped pendant with a bird on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yes, I also have a pendant that reminds me of my mother. And what is special for you about your jewelry?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It has a special symbol on it that represents freedom for me. It's a nice reminder to go for my goals and not get held back.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It should really give you strength and energy!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Do you have goals?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: One of my goals is to keep teaching yoga and supporting my community. I'm passionate about helping people find peace and joy through it.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What inspired you to go down this route?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yoga helped me find peace during a rough time, and now I'm passionate about sharing that with others.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It is truly inspiring!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Gotta run, bye!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Looking forward to the next chat!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, sorry to tell you this but my dad passed away two days ago. It's been really tough on us all - his sudden death left us all kinda shell-shocked. I'm trying to channel my grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories. These moments remind me to live life fully.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sorry to hear about your dad, Deborah. Losing a parent is tough - how's it going for you and your family?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Even though it's hard, it's comforting to look back on the great memories. We looked at the family album. Photos give me peace during difficult times. This is my parents' wedding in 1993. [image: a photo of a bride and groom posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bride and groom posing for a picture

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: They were a beautiful couple!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: My husband and I are trying to be as good a family as my parents were!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What do you value in your relationship?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It is love, and openness that have kept us close all these years. Being there for each other has made us both happy. Look what letter I received yesterday! [image: a photo of a note written to someone on a piece of paper]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a note written to someone on a piece of paper

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What touching words! Who is this letter from?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: The group members sent this to me! They thanked me for the positive influence I had on them. Those moments remind me why I'm so passionate about yoga.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Where do you most often do yoga?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: This is one of the places where I do it. [image: a photo of a living room with a television and a window]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a living room with a television and a window

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Where is it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's my old home. I go there now and then for my mom, who passed away. Sitting in that spot by the window gives me peace.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Must be great to have that place where you feel connected to her.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, it's special. I can feel her presence when I sit there and it comforts me. [image: a photo of a window seat in a room with a window]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a window seat in a room with a window

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, it sounds like that spot holds a lot of sentimental value. Does it bring back any special memories?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, Jolene. She'd sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies. It was one of her favorite places in the house.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a view of the sky from an airplane window

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What other hobbies did your mother have?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Travel was also her great passion!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I want to show you one of my snakes! They always calm me down and make me happy. This is Susie. [image: a photo of a bed with a snake head sticking out of it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bed with a snake head sticking out of it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Having a pet totally brightens up your life. It's great that it brings you comfort. Do you have any fun moments with your pet that you'd like to share?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I was playing video games and my pet just slinked out of her cage and coiled up next to me - it was too funny! My second snake Seraphim did it. Look at her sly eyes! [image: a photo of a snake sticking its head out of a blanket]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a snake sticking its head out of a blanket

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Awww, that's so nice!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I bought it a year ago in Paris.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Cool, Jolene! Pets bring so much happiness!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: They are very unusual pets! Here's me and my partner gaming last week - it's so fun. We played the game "Detroit" on the console. We are both crazy about this activity! [image: a photo of a person laying in bed with a dog watching tv]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person laying in bed with a dog watching tv

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Did your boyfriend teach you to play?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Even as a child I learned to play on my own.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Do you only play old games or try new ones?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We are planning to play "Walking Dead" next Saturday.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Take care and keep spreading those good vibes!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! You too, take care. See ya!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hi Deb! How're you? I've been busy. My engineering professor gave us a huge robotics project. It's tough but fun, it's making me get creative and problem-solve. [image: a photo of a table with a robot on it and a laptop]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a table with a robot on it and a laptop

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! It's great to hear from you. It sounds challenging but interesting! It must be really putting your creative and problem-solving skills to the test. How did you feel when you first received the project? Are you enjoying working on it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: When I got it, I felt a mix of emotions - excited and nervous. But now, I'm really enjoying it! It's like trying to solve a puzzle, figuring out the best design and programming. Seeing the robot come together is awesome too!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's awesome, Jolene! You're enjoying the process. It must be really satisfying to see it come together. Keep up the good work! Oh, by the way, I met my new neighbor Anna yesterday!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a yellow sign with a picture of a family

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: How did you two meet?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It happened at yoga in the park.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, that's awesome! It's great connecting with people who have similar interests. Did you two talk about it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, we talked about how it has improved our lives and the sense of community it gives.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sounds great!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a purse with a plant on a table

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you ever thought about resuming yoga?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Well... we planned to play the console with my partner.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's also good that you have something to do together.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks for the kind words!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Gotta run bye!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: See you soon!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah! Good to hear from you. How've you been? I've been on an emotional rollercoaster lately, but I'm coping.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you. All good here - how about you? Anything new happening lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I had a major milestone last week and it went really well - I'm so relieved and proud. It was a huge accomplishment for me as an engineer.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's awesome. You must have worked really hard for that. I'm so proud of you. Care to share more about it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks so much! I had to plan and research a lot to design and build a sustainable water purifier for a rural community in need. It was tough, but I loved the experience.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Your engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area. That's amazing! How did it feel when you saw it working?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It was such a surreal moment. Seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying. It reminded me of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives. It made me feel like I had a purpose and had done something good.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: So, what are your career aspirations now?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I want to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions. My goal is to contribute towards making the world a better place with my work.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'm sure great things will keep coming your way. Keep up the good work and follow your passions!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Your support means a lot. I'm determined to keep going and make a difference. Your encouragement really motivates me to pursue my passions.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: When things get tough, just take a deep breath and remember why you're doing this. This is where I spend a lot of my time, teaching yoga. It's a great way to find balance and reconnect with ourselves. I bonded with Anna during yesterday's l yoga class. [image: a photo of two women in a dance studio doing a dance pose]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two women in a dance studio doing a dance pose

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, that's awesome! What new poses did you try?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We were trying out different dance poses, like Warrior II, which builds strength and boosts focus.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on a chair

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Is it difficult to do?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yes, but this brought us closer to Anna! We supported each other, that means a lot.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Can you explain how to do it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sure! To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted. Twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support. You'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sounds really hard! Here's my bookshelf! [image: a photo of a book shelf with a lot of books on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book shelf with a lot of books on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's quite a collection! Have you had a favorite book lately? I'd love to hear your thoughts.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks Deborah! I'm really into this book called "Sapiens" - it's a fascinating look at human history and how technology has affected us. It's giving me a lot to think about!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Great, this is interesting! Have you come across any recent ones that really struck you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Two weeks ago I read "Avalanche" by Neal Stephenson in one sitting!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That sounds cool, Jolene. Stories can be so powerful - they can teach us, motivate us, and bring us together.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I also read a recent story about someone who became successful despite facing numerous challenges. It really showed me that anything is possible if you believe and work hard.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's a really powerful message. It reminds me of someone special and their grace and strength when they faced hardships. Check out this creation! [image: a photo of a bouquet of flowers in a vase on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bouquet of flowers in a vase on a table

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, Deb! That's beautiful! Can you tell me the backstory of that bouquet?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: My friend gave me this bouquet when I was struggling, and it gives me hope and courage. I'm filled with warmth and appreciation when I look at it.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That's really sweet. Such a small thing can make a real difference.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's amazing how something as simple as flowers can make a real difference. Nature sure is beautiful.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Where are some of your favorite nature spots?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Oh, there's so many great places! My favorite is a park with a forest trail - it's so calming getting lost in nature. Then there's this beach nearby that I love - the sound of the waves and the sand under my feet make me feel all peaceful and happy. Do you have any favorite spots, Jolene?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Here's a picture I took on vacation last summer in Bogota. It was so beautiful and calming watching the sunset over the water. It definitely made me appreciate nature's calming power. [image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That sounds great, Jolene. Nature's calming for sure. Guess it helps us forget the daily craziness and find inner peace. No wonder you're a fan! I like to come to this spot by the water near my mom's old house. It's where I reflect on her life and find some peace. Being surrounded by nature helps a lot. [image: a photo of a small island with a lone boat in the water]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a small island with a lone boat in the water

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That's so touching! Do you have any little traditions that you do when you come to reflect on your mom?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Do you remember this amulet from her? Whenever I come here, I bring it with me. It's how I feel her love and stay close to her. Holding it brings me comfort. [image: a photo of a woman wearing a white shirt and a gold chain necklace]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman wearing a white shirt and a gold chain necklace

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's amazing how something so small can have such a big impact, huh?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, even small things like this can make a big difference. It's a reminder of all the love and strength we have inside, connecting us to people we've lost and comforting us.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It can keep them close in our hearts every day.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Anna also has a pendant that she wears in memory of her mother! This also brought us closer.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's nice to have those reminders as a source of strength when we need it.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Life's tough but hang in there. Look to your sources of strength and you'll do great. Stay in touch, take care of yourself, and know I'm always here to cheer you on!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Your encouragement means a lot to me. I'll definitely stay in touch. Bye, take care and keep shining!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Stay safe!  Bye!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah! Been a few days since we last talked so I wanted to fill you in on something cool. Last Wednesday I did a mini retreat to assess where I'm at in life. It was a dope experience that totally gave me a new outlook.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Sounds great. Taking time to reflect can be really awesome. Did you gain any new insights from it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep! I achieved so much more than I imagined. It was a real confidence boost.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You deserve credit for stepping outside your comfort zone and believing in yourself. What cool stuff did you accomplish at the retreat?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I really accomplished something with my engineering project - I came up with some neat solutions and I'm really excited about it.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Let's go into more detail.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Green tech could really make a difference in disadvantaged areas. I'd like to look into it and see how I can contribute. Hey, speaking of helping out, I had an idea: a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids. What do you think of that?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That sounds great, Jolene! It's a great way to help and inspire others. They would benefit a lot from your knowledge. Have you thought of a plan yet?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Haven't finished planning yet but I'm thinking of teaming up with local schools/centers to do workshops. We could even invite engineers as guest speakers to show kids their career options.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Having guest speakers, like them, would definitely give the kids a real-world view. Have you reached out to any schools or centers yet?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: No, not yet. I want to solidify the plan first. Can't wait to start reaching out, though!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That makes sense. I'm excited to hear how you reach out and help those kids. Let me know how it goes!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll keep you posted! Appreciate the support! Here are my sketches in the planner. [image: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notebook with a page of notes]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notebook with a page of notes

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds like you're doing great. Let me know if you need more tips or information.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! If I need anything else, I'll let you know. You're awesome!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You're awesome too! Take care!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Stay safe!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah, totally buzzing! Had a great night out last night - dinner, and drinks with my friends. So glad I got to let my hair down. You? [image: a photo of a plate of food and a glass of wine]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plate of food and a glass of wine

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds great, Jolene! I just visited this place and it was so calming. Nostalgic too. [image: a photo of a garden with a bunch of flowers in buckets]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a garden with a bunch of flowers in buckets

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, those flowers are beautiful! What type are they? It looks so peaceful there.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: The roses and dahlias bring me peace. I lost a friend last week, so I've been spending time in the garden to find some comfort.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sorry to hear about your friend, Deb. Losing someone can be really tough. How are you holding up?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks for the kind words. It's been tough, but I'm comforted by remembering our time together. It reminds me of how special life is.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Memories can give us so much comfort and joy.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Memories keep our loved ones close. This is the last photo with Karlie which was taken last summer when we hiked. It was our last one. We had such a great time! Every time I see it, I can't help but smile. [image: a photo of two women are riding on a motorcycle on a dirt road]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two women are riding on a motorcycle on a dirt road

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, looks like a great trip! Where else have you traveled?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I've been blessed to travel to a few places and Bali last year was one of my favs. It was a gorgeous island that gave me peace, great for yoga. [image: a photo of a swing on a beach with a blue sky]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a swing on a beach with a blue sky

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, that's great! Is yoga on the beach a thing? I've been wanting to try it.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: The sound of the waves and the fresh air is wonderful!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll definitely give it a go! It sounds peaceful. Thanks!

turns.speaker: Deborah
