turns.text: Let me know how it goes. Enjoy it!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll keep you posted if I decide to go there.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Take care!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hi Deborah, it's been a while! Since we last talked, so much has happened. Balancing engineering school with my partner's video games is quite a feat. But I'm also setting aside time for myself, doing yoga and meditation. It helps give me calm amidst the craziness.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Great to hear from you. Taking a break is key. How have those practices been helping with everything?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: They seriously saved me. I chill out and gain perspective when I do yoga. Afterward, I'm more alert and motivated. Here is my last photo. [image: a photo of a woman sitting on a yoga mat doing a yoga pose]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman sitting on a yoga mat doing a yoga pose

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, cool that yoga has been helping you out! Do they also do yoga with you? Does your partner do yoga with you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: He started joining me sometimes, which is nice for bonding and relaxing. It's brought us closer. This is just our random photo. [image: a photo of a man and a woman holding hands with rings on them]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man and a woman holding hands with rings on them

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Aw, that's wonderful! How long have you been married?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We're not married yet but we've been together for three years. We're taking it slow and loving the ride. This ring on his hand is just a decoration, not a wedding ring.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds nice, Jolene. Enjoying the journey is the main thing. So, how did you two meet?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We actually met in an engineering class in college and quickly became friends. It eventually blossomed into something more and it's been great!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book and a calculator on a table

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, your relationship started from a strong friendship. Do you still enjoy working on engineering projects together?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep, teaming up for these projects feels great! We get each other's struggles and both love it.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of men standing in front of a building

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have yoga or meditation helped with any stress?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Whenever I'm overwhelmed, I just take a break and do some breathing or meditate. It really helps me feel calmer and clearer, so I'm able to handle challenges more easily.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's been great to see your progress since we last chatted - keep it up!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Your support really means a lot. I'm gonna keep pushing forward and continue taking time for myself.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Always rooting for you. Remember to listen to your heart and take good care. Here's a photo I took while reflecting outdoors. It's a reminder to find peace even in chaos. [image: a photo of a person sitting on a bench looking at the sunset]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person sitting on a bench looking at the sunset

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm curious, what does your daily routine look like?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: In the morning, I meditate, do yoga, and teach classes. And yesterday I went for a morning jog for the first time in a nearby park. I will now incorporate this into my daily routine. And in the evenings, I spend time with loved ones.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Why did you decide that?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: This is a great healthy habit!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's like they say - "Can't pour from an empty cup." Looking out for ourselves gives us the energy to help others. And don't forget, you're worth it too!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb. Your words really mean something to me. I'll keep remembering to prioritize self-care.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, Anna got me a vegan stir-fry the other day - tofu and veg with ginger and soy sauce. It was really tasty! Food is such a wonderful source of pleasure and nourishment. What dishes are comforting to you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: One of my favorite dishes is lasagna! Comfort food can be a great pick-me-up. I've got a lot going on with my studies and exams.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you been able to find time for yourself lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I've been trying to squeeze in some me-time. Last Friday, I did yoga and meditation to relax. Did you find time for yourself too?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a wooden floor and a window

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I also did the same, it helped me reset my mind. How does it make you feel?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's amazing how a few quiet moments can work wonders for the soul.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a purse with a plant on a table

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you been able to get outside lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I did take Seraphim to the park last Sunday. She loved it and here's a pic. [image: a photo of a lizard laying on the ground surrounded by leaves]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a lizard laying on the ground surrounded by leaves

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Looks like you guys had fun!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We explored new places. People are surprised when they see a tamed snake. What do you like about being outdoors?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hmm... The birds chirping and the breeze gently blowing! It reminds me of what really matters.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep, it's like a reminder to slow down and appreciate the little things.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Is there anything you want to be more mindful of right now?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I need to be more mindful of my stress levels and take care of my mental health. Sometimes I get too caught up in my studies and forget to prioritize self-care.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Life can get hectic and it's easy to forget about ourselves.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Exams and deadlines got me feeling overwhelmed. Just look at my to-do list! It seems never-ending... Trying my best but it's been challenging. [image: a photo of a desk with a notebook and a computer monitor]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a notebook and a computer monitor

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Your efforts will bear fruit, don't give up!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb. Any tips on studying or time management?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: My tip is to break it into smaller pieces and set goals for yourself. For time management, planners or schedulers help you stay organized and give you time for yourself. Let me know if you need help with a study plan!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I appreciate your help with that.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Take care and good luck with your exams. I'll give you a mug just like this one! It encourages. [image: a photo of a yellow coffee cup with a handwritten message]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a yellow coffee cup with a handwritten message

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! This really cheered me up. All the best with your classes. Bye!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks, Jolene! Glad I could bring a smile to your face. Take care and make sure to give yourself some time to relax. Bye!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hi Jolene! We haven't corresponded for a long time!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb, yeah life can get chaotic. How's it been going lately?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: So much has been going on lately. I started this yoga class in the neighborhood - it's such a good feeling! Now I get to share the exercise with my neighbors and watch it really transform them.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Congrats. How did you do this?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks! My neighbors were interested in trying yoga, so I hosted a class for them on Friday. It was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it. Here is our photo together. [image: a photo of a group of women posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of women posing for a picture

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That's cool! What made you want to start teaching it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I find it calming and wanted to share that with others. Giving people peace and awareness brings me so much happiness.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, Deb! It's awesome when we can share something we love and make things better for others.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Teaching it is awesome because it can help others and I've made such great friends through it. It's really nice for building community connections.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That's really motivating. It's great to have support in tough times.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's one of life's best parts, right?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, having someone to rely on is key in tough times. It really makes a difference in how we handle life. Plus, there's something I wanted to tell you.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What's up? I'm listening. We'll figure it out.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm having a hard time dealing with my Engineering assignments. It's a lot to manage and I'm struggling to keep up. Can we still talk about time management?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sure, Jolene. Let's find a time that works for both of us.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Let's find a time to chat - I'll check my schedule and get back to you.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Take your time, Jolene. We'll work it out. Take care of yourself, OK?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll make sure to take it. See you soon!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'm here for you if you need me. Let's catch up soon.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Have a great day!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, it's been a while. Hope you're doing okay with all your exams and deadlines. I know it's difficult for you right now.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb! Yeah, it can be tough. Trying to find time for everything is like playing catch-up - really stressful!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: How do you manage your time and stay organized with all the projects and deadlines?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm using the Pomodoro Technique - 25 minutes work, 5-minute break - to avoid burnout but I'm still struggling to prioritize. Do you have any other tips on time management?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I create a daily schedule or to-do list. Here's my example for today. [image: a photo of a notepad with a list of things to do]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a list of things to do

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I tried making one but it's kinda overwhelming when it's a big stack of tasks. Here's an example from last Friday. [image: a photo of a notepad with notes on it on a counter]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with notes on it on a counter

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you tried breaking it down or prioritizing the tasks?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It can often feel overwhelming and difficult to figure out where to start.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I get it, Jolene. When I'm overloaded, I use a certain method. It helps me figure out what's important and urgent so I'm more organized. Do you know about it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Nah, I'm not familiar with that one. What's it about?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Want me to tell you about it? It helps you organize things based on how important and urgent they are.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sure, tell me more about it! It sounds useful.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: The Eisenhower Matrix sorts tasks into four boxes, categorizing them based on their urgency and importance. It can be really useful for organizing and prioritizing. Here's a breakdown. [image: a photo of a pair of scissors sitting on top of a piece of paper]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a pair of scissors sitting on top of a piece of paper

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: The visualization is helpful too. Thanks for sharing!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I am glad, it was helpful. Let's give it a try and see if it helps you stay focused and less stressed.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, I'll give it a go. Fingers crossed it'll help me. Thanks for the help!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Don't forget to take it easy and look after yourself. Wishing you all the best! Recently, Anna and I were sitting by the sea, watching the sunset and talking about each other. And we realized that we inspire each other. What thoughts does the sea in this photo make you think of? [image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: This gets me thinking of when I'll learn to surf. Gotta find that spare time!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Surfing, huh Jolene? Chase your dreams, don't be daunted. Have you thought about the steps you can take?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Definitely! I've been gathering information, watching videos, and I even got a beginners' guide to surfing. Just need to find the right time and place to get a lesson.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Way to go! Taking those first steps is key. Believe in yourself and keep going!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a row of surfboards leaning against a palm tree

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks for the support! Those got me pumped to try surfing. Gonna keep pushing myself to make it happen.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Keep it up, Jolene! Remember, the experience matters just as much as the end result. Step by step and have fun along the way. You can do it!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks for the boost!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb, long time no talk. A lot's happened! On Friday I had a breakthrough with my engineering project. Finally found a solution to a prob that's been bugging me. Feels great to see my hard work paying off.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person's hand holding a pair of scissors

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You've really proven your skills. Feels great, right? Keep it up! And I bought new props for the yoga class! Here it is in action. [image: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a room]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a room

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Oh, I also have new details for this case! Rate it! [image: a photo of a cardboard mat with a cup of coffee on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a cardboard mat with a cup of coffee on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That`s cool! I also bought this candle for the atmosphere and to improve my yoga practice. How about you? When you do it, what feelings do you get? [image: a photo of a candle with a sprig of rosemary on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a candle with a sprig of rosemary on a table

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I feel relaxed during this activity. I love creating a serene space with soothing scents like lavender and rosemary. Do you have any favorite scents or rituals for when you do it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'm also a big fan of scents like this! Candles and essential oils add warmth and calm to my yoga session. It's amazing how certain smells can transport you to a place of peace.  Do you have any other ways to enhance your yoga practice?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I find music helps me. Any favorite tracks?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I find instrumental tracks with mellow melodies and rhythms help create a peaceful vibe. One of my favorites is a track called "Savana." What songs/artists do you like listening to during your practice?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I love listening to Nils Frahm and Olafur Arnalds during my practice. Their music is so calming and puts me in a different headspace. Do you have any recommendations for other similar artists or tracks I should check out?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Also, I'm listening to an album called 'Sleep,' which is great for meditation and deep relaxation. Hope you find it as calming as I do!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks for the tips, Deborah! I'm gonna check them out. It's always good to have some new tunes for yoga!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Let me know your thoughts on the albums!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: See you!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Take care and keep up the good work!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Great to see you! Had a blast biking nearby with my neighbor last week - was so freeing and beautiful. Checked out an art show with a friend today - really cool and inspiring stuff. Reminded me of my mom.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a large brown and white photo of a person

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah! Sounds like you had a blast biking and at the art show. Your photo looks like you were really into it! Did it make you think profound thoughts?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: My mom was interested in art. She believed art could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect us. When I go to an art show, it's like we're still experiencing it together even though she's gone. It's hard but comforting.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Losing someone is hard, but finding something that helps you cope is great.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Finding ways to keep her memory alive gives me peace. It's amazing how something simple like artwork can bring back powerful emotions and remind us of those we've lost. It's about finding solace in the things we love, and art has done that for me.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Even though my snakes can't chat or understand what I'm going through, our time together is valuable and teaches me to take time and be in tune with myself. Similarly, playing video games with my partner after a long day is a great way for me to relax.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Simple things can indeed bring us the most happiness. How have these activities helped you during tough times?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It brings us closer together!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: This kind of comfort can be really helpful when times get tough.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad my support means a lot to you! I'll always be here for you.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Take care!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Enjoy your day and make time for the things that bring you joy. See ya!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll make sure to find time for that. Have a good one!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah! Long time no talk - I had lots of stuff going on. Remember the tough engineering project? I finally wrapped that up last month. Look at the result! [image: a photo of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Jolene! Congrats on wrapping up your with it! You really put in the work and it paid off.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm really proud of myself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it. It's definitely a big milestone.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Now that you've reached this big milestone, what do you have planned next?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm interning at a well-known engineering firm. It's been a great opportunity to test my skills and gain real-world experience. These are my new colleagues! [image: a photo of a group of construction workers posing for a picture]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of construction workers posing for a picture

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What's been the best part of it so far?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: The best part so far has been being able to apply what I learned in school to real projects. It's so fulfilling to see my ideas come to life.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Mind if I ask how the internship has impacted you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It has had a positive impact on my life. It has stoked my love of engineering and has encouraged me to keep striving for my dreams.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: How has it inspired you to keep striving for your dreams?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hanging out with people who love what they do has really inspired me to stay focused and keep working towards my goals. It's shown me that with dedication and effort, anything is possible.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you been able to find a good work-life balance during your internship?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Honestly, finding that balance has been tough. I've been slogging away and it's been hard to make time for my hobbies and chilling out.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have you considered taking some breaks and finding activities like yoga to help you relax and unwind? That might make a difference.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, I`m trying to do it. Here's an example of how I spent yesterday morning, yoga on top of mount Talkeetna. [image: a photo of a man standing on a rock with his arms outstretched]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man standing on a rock with his arms outstretched

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Nice job, Jolene! How long have you been doing yoga and meditation? It looks like it's really helping you regroup and recharge.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I've been doing them sporadically for about 3 years now and they've had a real positive effect on me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Has it benefited you in any way? Have you found it helpful in difficult moments?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It has helped me with stress and kept me centered.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad they've been helpful for you!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: No idea how I would've survived without them!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: This is my favorite studio and it's always so calming. [image: a photo of a room with a bench and a window]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a bench and a window

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I was wondering if you have any advice on calming the mind and breathing during yoga?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'd recommend practicing mindful breathing for yoga. Set aside a few minutes each day to sit with your eyes closed, take deep breaths, and focus on how the air feels entering and leaving your body.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deborah! I'll definitely give it a try. Appreciate the advice!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: If you need more tips or help, just let me know. Take care!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: See you!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! How's it going? We haven't talked in a while. I've been busy getting ready for a yoga retreat with some buddies. A chance to hang out with people who think like me and find peace and understanding. Sounds awesome! [image: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a park]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a park

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb! Been super hectic with internship and stuff. That retreat sounds awesome, I could definitely use a break!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: By the way, I tried a new pose - Dancer Pose (Natarajasana). Rate, did I succeed? [image: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: You are amazing as always! Here are new photos of Seraphim in the new aquarium that I bought the day before yesterday. [image: a photo of a snake curled up in a plant filled area]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a snake curled up in a plant filled area

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Where'd you get it? I'm always drawn to animals, they bring so much joy. What's its story?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I got her last year, she's a great pet. She always cheers me up and brings a sense of peace. Spending time with her is so comforting.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Pets really do make life more enjoyable and bright.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a field

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm so thankful it's here. Plus, it's nice to have a calm creature around.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: How have things been besides that?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Things have been intense lately. I'm really pushing myself to succeed, and sometimes it feels overwhelming. But I'm determined to overcome any obstacles and achieve my goals.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Keep up the hard work and remember to relax too.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deborah! I had a big breakthrough with this project - so exciting and rewarding! [image: a photo of a drawing of a house with a ruler and a ruler]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a drawing of a house with a ruler and a ruler

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Awesome, Jolene! I'm really glad your project worked out.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Stop talking about me, tell me more about your retreat.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'd rather show you a photo. This is also a new yoga pose that we tried. It is a tree pose. [image: a photo of three people standing in front of a large statue]
turns.image_caption: a photo of three people standing in front of a large statue

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What's that statue in the picture?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's a symbol of peace and enlightenment.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, it looks gorgeous! I'd love to visit a retreat like that. It seems like the ideal spot to find peace and refreshment.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's perfect for reflecting and getting centered.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I could really use some chill time like that. Sounds so peaceful.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, we all need some peaceful time to relax.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Gotta run, have a nice day!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: See you!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a sunset reflecting in a lake with a boat

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! I started a running group with Anna - it's awesome connecting with people who care about fitness! [image: a photo of three men standing next to each other on a road]
turns.image_caption: a photo of three men standing next to each other on a road

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Cool, Deb! Glad you found some people to get fit with. I'm trying to add workouts into my studying schedule, which has been tough but fun. How about you? Any challenges with the running group?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Oh, I'm having a blast with it! We help and push each other during our runs, which makes it so much easier to stay motivated.  I have a lot of my photos from this activity. [image: a photo of a woman standing on a sidewalk with a skateboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman standing on a sidewalk with a skateboard

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Deborah, that's awesome! Being part of a supportive group must be super motivating. Finding a team that's passionate about something makes a huge difference. Just thinking about my own journey too.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Having people who can cheer you on and give you advice really makes a difference. What has it been like for you finding supportive folks?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Gaming's been tough lately, but I'm grateful I have someone who's also into it. My partner helps me stay focused on our goals. We have a lot of cute photos, I want to share with you. [image: a photo of a man and a woman sitting in a chair in front of a computer]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man and a woman sitting in a chair in front of a computer

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What do you like best about gaming together?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We get to tackle challenges and have a shared experience. It's always a blast when we're into the same game and achieve something tough. Plus, it's a great way to bond and get closer.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Woah, that's cool! Gaming is so good for strengthening relationships. Do you two have a favorite game to play together?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, we love playing "It takes two" together! It's a fun team-strategy game and it's competitive. Plus, it's a great way for us to bond. Do you have any activities you like doing with people?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yep, I do running and yoga/meditation with others. Connecting with people and creating a community is great. Plus, I love organizing workshops and events to practice mindfulness and self-care. It's an awesome way to have fun, build relationships, and support each other's growth. [image: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a park]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people doing yoga in a park

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sounds like a great way to relax. What do your workshops and events involve?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It involves various activities such as yoga, meditation, and self-reflection. They aim to cultivate self-awareness, promote mental and emotional well-being, and help individuals find inner peace. It's a space where people can connect, explore, and grow.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Your events are awesome for helping people connect and learn, it is so important. How has everything been going for you?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks, Jolene! It's been great seeing everyone come together and support each other. It's amazing to witness the growth and transformation that happens through these workshops. I'm honored to be a part of it.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a game board with a bunch of cards on it

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, Deb! I can imagine how rewarding it must be to create a space for growth and change. It's great to hear that everything's going well. You can always count on me for support! I just want to share a photo with you. [image: a photo of a snake on a branch with a book]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a snake on a branch with a book

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks, Jolene! Your support means a lot to me. I'm here for you too. By the way, I noticed your pet in the picture. What made you decide to get a snake?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I was fascinated by reptiles, and it felt like the perfect pet for me. Taking care of it has been really calming, and it's a great way to connect with nature.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad you found something that gives you peace and calm. Do you have a favorite memory with "it" to share?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I have lots of great memories, like our little 'snake adventure'. She got out and I spent hours searching, so relieved when I finally found her snuggling under the bed. It really showed how much I love her. [image: a photo of a snake in a tank with sand and plants]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a snake in a tank with sand and plants

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What was it like when you found her? I can imagine the relief!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Seeing her snuggled under the bed made me feel so much love and gratitude. It made me realize how important she is to me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: They bring so much joy and remind us of what's important.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Animals teach us a lot about love and gratitude, and they bring so much joy.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I haven't introduced you to my pets yet! I don't like dogs, that's why I have cats. [image: a photography of two cats sitting on a couch with a blanket]
turns.image_caption: a photography of two cats sitting on a couch with a blanket

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Looks like they're having a blast! How often do you take them out?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Exercise and nature are really important to me, so I make sure to take them out for a run in the park every morning and evening.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow Deb, that's great! I'd love to experience that every day.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Nature helps me find peace every day - it's so refreshing!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's a pity that my snakes don't run!  I'd love to do that more often. They would motivate me and together it would be more fun.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's like hitting a reset button that helps me put things into perspective and gives me time to reflect.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, I totally get it. Whenever I can, I love going for walks to take it all in. And I take photos like this [image: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a sunset over a body of water

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's amazing how nature has the power to bring us peace and clarity.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: This photo captures the peacefulness of a lake surrounded by trees. [image: a photo of a dock on a lake with trees in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a dock on a lake with trees in the background

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Why did you choose that spot? It looks so calm.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's such a hidden gem! It makes me feel so peaceful and tranquil.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Lucky you for having somewhere to relax and tune out!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We'll definitely go there together sometime!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We all need a timeout!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Great news - I just started a project for a cleanup in our community and have been trying to raise funds for it. It's been amazing to see everyone come together to make a difference. How've you been? Anything new going on?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Debs! Congrats on your project for the community! As for me, life's been a rollercoaster lately. Last week, I had a huge setback with my project. I put in so much work and it all crashed and I lost everything. SO frustrating and depressing.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Jolene, sorry to hear that. It must be really tough. I'm here for you and if I can do anything, just let me know. Is there anything that's helping you cope?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Your support means a lot. Susie really helps when times get tough. Pets have been great company. Video games have also been a nice distraction. [image: a photo of a man holding a snake on his arm]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man holding a snake on his arm

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: They can really provide love and comfort, especially during tough times. How did you come to have Susie?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I adopted her two years ago when I was feeling lonely and wanted some company.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's great, Jolene! Animals sure have a way of bringing us happiness. They understand us and provide us with comfort. Plus, having a pet teaches us responsibility. She came at the perfect time - cherish those moments with her and find strength in her presence.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks Deborah. Having her around shows me I can stay strong and find joy in the small stuff.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Enjoying the little things is key. Those little moments can give us a boost and push us forward. How have you been taking care of yourself lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm trying to prioritize self-care, like yoga and meditation. It helps me stay balanced and grounded.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: If you're interested, I can suggest some routines for you to try.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm always on the lookout for new routines to mix things up.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: In the meantime, check out this great place for yoga. [image: a photo of a room with a lot of yoga mats on the floor]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a lot of yoga mats on the floor

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: This room looks perfect for it. Do you have any favorite routines you can share?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: One of my favorite yoga routines is a gentle flow that's all about breathing and grounding. It helps me find my chill. I'll send you a tutorial video with the poses. This is me in the process :) [image: a photo of a woman in a pink shirt doing a yoga pose]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman in a pink shirt doing a yoga pose

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow! Does that help you find your chill or improve your concentration?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's a great way to find balance in tough times. Try it out and let me know what you think!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Can't wait to try it out. Let's chat soon!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Let me know how it goes. Talk to you later!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep, I'll practice and update you. Bye!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Since we last spoke, I made a meditation guide for my yoga retreat. How about you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I have been stressed since I lost my work files. I was so overwhelmed...but meditation kept me chill and I got my clarity back, thank goodness. Really appreciate the practice!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's amazing how it can give you peace and calm in times like that. If you ever need any support, just let me know - we're in this together!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Appreciate your support! BTW, I wanted to share this with you. [image: a photo of two notebooks with a blue cover and a white strip]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two notebooks with a blue cover and a white strip

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Your creativity is amazing!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry. I think they turned out really cool!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Working on a cool project now - a prototype that could revolutionize aerial surveillance. Can't wait to see the results!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I admire your ambition to make a difference. Do you have any specific plans or goals for this project?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: My aim is to devise a more productive and affordable aerial surveillance system. It'll help with responding to emergencies and monitoring the environment. It'll make the world a better, safer place.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I love your commitment. Keep going!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep pushing and doing my best to make a difference.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You got this!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Been thinking a lot about my plans lately, especially after checking in with my bf. It's been up and down!  Some days it feels like I'm trying to juggle my engineering, relationship, and growing as a person, and I just don't know how to handle it all. How do you manage when it's too much?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a book with a checklist on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Finding ways to restore balance is important. Taking time for yourself and recognizing your needs can make a difference.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a moss wall and a floor cushion

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! I've been trying out some time management strategies recently and started using a bullet journal. It's been really helpful for tracking my tasks and staying organized.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's great to hear that it's been helping you out!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Not only does it help me stay on top of everything, but it's also so satisfying when I cross tasks off my list. Here's a pic of my newest spread with one of my favorite quotes. [image: a photo of a notebook with a quote on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a quote on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I love this quote. So uplifting. Does it motivate you when you see it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, it's like a little reminder to stick to my goals and never give up.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Gotcha! Visual reminders like this photo can be super motivating. Keep focusing on your goals, Jolene, and don't give up! I led a meditation yoga sessionto the elderly at a local care home last week during sunset. Nature can be really helpful for finding peace. Have you tried mindfulness too? [image: a photo of a group of people doing yoga on a beach]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people doing yoga on a beach

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Haven't tried it yet, but I'm keen to give it a shot. That sounds really peaceful. I could use some of that calm in my life right now.  I'm interested in destressing and trying mindfulness.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I started with workshops and books, and now mindfulness is a huge part of my life.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'll definitely look into some of it. Can't wait to get started!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's great, Jolene! I'm so glad you're willing to try some mindfulness. It can be really helpful. Let me know if you need any help getting started - I'm happy to assist you with your journey!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I really appreciate it.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We're in this together. Give me a shout if you need anything. Bye for now.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, I'll hit you up if I need anything. Bye for now.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Hope you're having a good one. Last Friday I told Anna the story of my life and they were super kind about it. It was so nice to have a meaningful connection. How's the mindfulness workshops and reading going? Need any help?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Life's been hella busy since we last talked. I bought a console for my partner as a gift on the 17th and it's so much fun, he even managed to play it.! Engineering studies are still going strong too. Balance has been key for me lately. How about you? What's been up? [image: a photo of a black xbox console with a yoda yoda figure next to it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a black xbox console with a yoda yoda figure next to it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Well done! As for me, I've been focusing on teaching yoga and spending time with the community. Organizing a yoga event last month was really cool.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Was it rewarding seeing everyone come together? Can you tell me more about how you put it together? Also, any tips for maintaining a balance between hobbies and studies?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I reached out to different nearby businesses and places to make it happen. We had yoga, food stalls, and even some live music - it was amazing! As for balancing hobbies and studies, I find it helpful to prioritize and manage my time effectively. Making a schedule and setting aside specific time for studying and pursuing hobbies can go a long way in maintaining balance.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, that's awesome! Gonna make a plan to manage my studies and hobbies. Say, do you ever play video games?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I used to play some video games, but it's been a while. It's a good way to relax after a busy day. Do you have any game suggestions? What's your favorite game?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I have a few game recommendations. Zelda BOTW for Switch is an awesome open-world game. Animal Crossing: New Horizons is really calming and cute. As for my favorite game, it's hard to choose just one!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Cool recs! I'll definitely check those out. What about your favorite memories of playing video games?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man and a woman sitting in a chair in front of a computer

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Oh, I forgot to mention Overcooked 2 - this is a good co-op game if you're into hilarious and chaotic cooking. My partner and I often play for bets! I once won three large pizzas!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Reminds me of when I used to play games with my husband. We'd take turns and it was a great way to bond and make memories. Gaming really can bring people closer, right?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, you`re right! What's your favorite game to play with that person?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We prefer to play detective games together.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What other activities do you both enjoy doing together?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We also enjoyed spending time outdoors and exploring nature. It was always so refreshing to be outside and soak up the fresh air.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm a big fan of being outside too! It's so calming and refreshing. Do you have any special spots you like to go to?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I love going to this park near my house - it has a nice forest trail and a beach. It's a peaceful spot where I can do some yoga and reflect. There's also a special bench that holds special meaning to me.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sounds lovely! Nature can be calming. What makes this bench special to you?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a bench in a park with a tree in the background

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It holds a lot of special memories for me and my mom - we would come here and chat about dreams and life. It's full of good moments.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person sitting on a bench in a forest

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That's awesome, Deborah! What were some of your favorite memories with your mom at this spot? It looks super peaceful and pretty.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'll always cherish my memories with her at this spot. I remember a beautiful sunset we watched together in silence - the colors in the sky were so special. Every time I go back, I feel so much peace and gratitude for the time I spent with her.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Places and moments like that can mean so much, and it's a gift to find peace and gratitude in them.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'm really thankful for all the time we had.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's so important to cherish it.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Long time no talk! We were given a new game for the console last week, it is Battlefield 1. What's been up with you?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you. That`s cool! Been thinking about a few big moments lately - went to a place that held a lot of memories for me. Sat on a bench where we used to chat and it brought back a lot of emotions. [image: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Mostly happy or a bit of everything?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It was quite a mix, Jolene. I felt nostalgia and longing, but also grateful for the memories. It's amazing how a place can mean so much. I brought these flowers there. [image: a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Do you think she would like it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, my mom really loved flowers. They always made her so happy. She appreciated the simple things in life. [image: a photo of a woman holding a bouquet of red roses]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman holding a bouquet of red roses

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, that's a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: By taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow Deb, that's awesome! We should definitely take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause us to miss out on the good stuff.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, Jolene. Life can be so busy that we often overlook the small things that truly matter. Let's make an effort to appreciate them more.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep Deb, slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness. I'm trying to do more yoga and meditation myself to help relax and stay focused. Are there any calming habits that you practice to feel balanced?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yeah, same here, Jolene! Yoga and meditation help me find balance and inner peace. Going out for walks and staying mindful also keep me grounded. I take similar photos on walks. [image: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a sunset over a body of water

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Gorgeous! Going for a walk and feeling so peaceful must be amazing.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Moments like that I'll always cherish.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That calm and peaceful feeling is so nice - it's great for recharging and thinking.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's like a reboot for me.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Got it! It's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What's your favorite yoga pose for some rest?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm a fan of savasana - aka the corpse pose. It's so calming and helps me just let go and surrender. [image: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Funny photo! How long have you been doing yoga?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Been doing it for 3 years. It's a great way to escape studying and work stress.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, Jolene! Taking time to unwind is key and that seems just right for you!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm really finding my zen again!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks for your support, Deb!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Good luck with everything. Stay in touch.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you! A lot's happened since we talked - last week I got to go to this yoga retreat near my mom's place. It was so cool - I got to hang with nature and really get to know myself. Definitely life-changing! That's how beautiful it was there! [image: a photo of a trail in a forest with moss and trees]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a trail in a forest with moss and trees

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wow, Deb, sounds great! Glad you got to connect with yourself and nature. That's my own way to relax. What are your thoughts on life now?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man bending over on a blanket in the grass

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Life's been super meaningful lately. Nature and self-reflection have helped me see how beautiful every moment is. We can really grow and learn when we listen to ourselves. What's been up with you lately? Any insights or experiences?
turns.image_caption: a photo of a mountain range with a colorful sunset in the background

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Life's been hectic, but I'm making strides toward my goals. It's tough, but satisfying.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Can you tell me a bit more about it and what you've achieved?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: My goal is to be successful in my field and make a positive impact. I've been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen. Recently, I had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback.  It was a great experience and confirmed that I'm on the right track.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You really put your heart and soul into it. Must have been amazing having it go so well. How did it feel when people gave you positive feedback? Any ideas for what comes next?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I was thrilled to receive such positive feedback! It felt so rewarding to know that my efforts were appreciated. Right now, I'm focusing on studying and gaining more experience. I'm even thinking about more internships to further enhance my skills. Exciting times! Hopefully, there will be more updates to share with you soon.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, Jolene! Way to go! I'm super proud of all you've achieved. Let me know if you need any help. Onward!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot to me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: No problem. You got this!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm not giving up, just gonna keep pushing forward.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Reach for your goals and don't forget to enjoy the journey.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb. Your support means a lot. I'll keep pushing forward and remember to enjoy every step of the way.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Come on! The journey's as important as the destination. Take time for yourself and find joy in it. We believe in you!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, you're right! I'll take your advice and find joy on the way. Cheers for the support!
turns.image_caption: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Always by your side!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, since we talked I've been thinking about my mom's influence. Remembering those we love is important.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I understand, Deb. Remembering and cherishing the memories of our loved ones is so important. It's comforting to know that their influence still guides us. Last Friday, my partner and I talked about how our loved ones have influenced us and what their values meant to us. It was an emotional chat, but it made us feel closer and showed us what really matters.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Those types of conversations really help build relationships. Can you tell me more about the values they have given you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Definitely! Our loved ones have taught us to persevere and stay resilient, like my mom always said to never give up, and my partner's dad showed them to stay determined. Their values have influenced us to pursue our goals, such as me with engineering and my partner with their creative endeavors. Even though they're not here, we both feel their values encouraging us along our paths.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's wonderful to hear, Jolene! It's amazing how their values continue to guide you, even in their absence. It sounds like you and your partner are honoring their memory by pursuing your respective passions. Have you ever considered incorporating those values into your work as well?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, Deborah! We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. Going further, my mom stressed the value of helping others and that's something I want to keep in mind for my engineering projects.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow Jolene, that's really inspiring!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds great, Jolene! Research is key to success. Little steps and being up for challenges make you stronger. I'm here for you. Connecting to yourself helps tackle any issue. Here's a photo that reminds me of the beauty of nature during a yoga session. [image: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It helps with challenges, giving balance and strength. Any tips for staying relaxed while studying?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Taking breaks, doing some stretching/yoga, or just going for a walk is really helpful. And don't forget to get enough sleep and take time for self-care. Finding a balance between work and taking care of yourself is important. What self-care activities have you been doing lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I've been into yoga and meditation lately. It helps me recharge. Doing different poses relieves tension and calms my mind. I've already shared my newfound love for yoga with my partner, and we're planning to go on a meditation retreat together to enhance our practice together. [image: a photo of a woman in a pink shirt doing a yoga pose]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman in a pink shirt doing a yoga pose

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad to hear that yoga is helping you rest and recharge. It's great for reflection and self-care. Do your snakes also enjoy it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: My snakes just like watching me chill. But she's a great company and always brings a sense of calm.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Having a pet around is such a calming feeling. They sure can bring a great sense of comfort. I still have cats, Luna is sitting on the left. [image: a photo of two cats sitting on a window sill looking out]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two cats sitting on a window sill looking out

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Aww, that's adorable! What's the second one's name?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Max! They bring lots of joy and peace to our home.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a brown leather chair and a black and white floor

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: How did you get them?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Max is my mother's cat, I took him when my mother passed away.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a car with a fan and a mesh bag

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: You're great for taming him. How did you get Luna?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I took Luna from the shelter.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It’s wonderful that you have become their loving owner!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yes, I really love cats, and they also need a home, love, and care! Moreover, Max is already old, he is 8 years old.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: How old is Luna?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: She is younger, she is 5 years old.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I am proud of your action to tame these pets!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deborah, how's it going? Guess what? Yesterday my partner and I got back from an awesome trip to Rio de Janeiro- we checked out some cool yoga classes. [image: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose in a mirror]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose in a mirror

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That yoga pose looks great. Must've been a cool experience for the two of you. What did the trip teach you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: This country was awesome! It showed me different kinds of yoga and their backgrounds, which made me appreciate it even more. We visited a lot of delicious cafes! Have you ever been somewhere that was important to you?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yep, last month I visited my mom`s house which holds a special place in my heart. My mom had good and bad times there, but it's still a symbol of her strength and the love she shared with me. This is my husband in front of this house. [image: a photo of a man standing in front of a house]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a man standing in front of a house

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What was it like?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It brought back fond memories as I relaxed outside.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sounds great! So glad you have a place to relax and find peace.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thanks, Jolene. It's special for me. How about you? Is there a place that helps you relax?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I go to this nearby place to meditate by a tranquil spot. [image: a photo of a pond with lily pads and a tree in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a pond with lily pads and a tree in the background

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Looks chill. What's been the effect of that?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It helps me make sense of everything and relieves stress. It's like a restart.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Cool, glad you found a place to chill. We all need that occasionally. This is one of my favorite spots to ponder and let things go. [image: a photo of a lake with a few trees in the water]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a lake with a few trees in the water

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Looks great! What made you pick that spot?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: The soothing vibes and nice views made it ideal for reflecting and letting go.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Here is one more photo from Rio de Janeiro. We went on many excursions there. [image: a photo of a group of people walking up a set of stairs]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people walking up a set of stairs

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, those stairs look cool! Where were they taken?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: We had a great time visiting an old temple. The stairs were amazing!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, exploring those temples must have been incredible! Three years ago I was also in Rio de Janeiro, I took a beautiful photo on one of the excursions. [image: a photo of a large stone structure with a mountain in the background]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a large stone structure with a mountain in the background

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: The architecture and history of it all were really interesting. I'm sure you also liked the places you visited there!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Exploring historical places and learning their stories is so fun. It was a great experience. I want to share this photo with you. [image: a photo of a hand holding a piece of paper with writing on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a hand holding a piece of paper with writing on it

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: By the way, what did that paper have written on it in the photo?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: This was written to me by a friend who, unfortunately, will never be able to support me. I miss him here. This quote says"Let go of what no longer serves you."

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm sorry! That's a good reminder to stay focused and let go of what no longer serves us. Remember the quote in my notebook? It also inspires me! [image: a photo of a notebook with a quote on it]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a quote on it

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What other quotes give you strength?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I came across this one while browsing and it really hit home with me. It's a great reminder to ditch the negative stuff and focus on growing and being positive. [image: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a plant on a table]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a plant on a table

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Surrounding ourselves with good stuff and striving to improve is key.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yep, Deborah! It's about creating a good atmosphere to help us grow and improve. By the way, I have a new plant. [image: a photo of a plant in a pot on a patio]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a plant in a pot on a patio

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What made you pick it?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I got this as a reminder to nurture myself and embrace fresh starts.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Nice job, Jolene! Take care of yourself and embrace new beginnings.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks Deb! Will do. Good talking to you. Take care!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Have a great day!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, just catching up. I went to a cool event last week with the aim to support each other - pretty inspiring. Have you been connecting with anyone lately?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb, great to hear from you! I've been focusing on studying and my relationship with my partner. We're taking little trips to the beach, it's a great way to relax. How about you, anything new going on?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I was busy too - went to a community meetup last Friday. We shared stories and it was nice to feel how connected we are. It made me think about how important relationships are. How about you, how are things going in that area?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm really thankful for my significant other right now. It's great to have someone encouraging my goals! How are things with your friends and family? Any updates on that front?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Relationships with family and friends are so vital. My yoga pals have been my second family - we've held each other up through a lot. The other day I found this old photo. That was when I first started doing yoga. My mum was my biggest fan and source of motivation. She'd often come to my classes with me. [image: a photo of a woman sitting on a yoga mat with two children]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman sitting on a yoga mat with two children

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Our loved ones sure are supportive! When I was 10, my parents got me that and it was the start of my passion for video games. [image: a photo of a nintendo game console and a game controller]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a nintendo game console and a game controller

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Cool that they shared that with you. Did you learn on your own or did they teach you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I taught myself, but my dad was always supportive and my mom would play games with me. [image: a photo of a nintendo wii game system with a game on the screen]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a nintendo wii game system with a game on the screen

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's awesome! Sounds like you had a lot of support from your parents. What was your favorite game to play with mom?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: One of my favorites was "Monster Hunter: World". The immersive story and open-world gaming are amazing!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It can be so freeing when you get immersed in a game like that.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah! It's my way to de-stress and take a break from life.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: What's up this month? Anything fun happening for you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Got a lot of finals coming up this month, so I've been studying real hard. It's been quite stressful, but it'll be worth it in the end. Thinking about taking a trip somewhere to relax and recharge afterward.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Good luck with it! Let me know if there's anything I can do to assist you.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Woohoo! I signed up for a meditation course at a retreat near a lake. Can't wait to share this experience with my partner and learn some new techniques. Sooo excited! [image: a photo of a building with a curved roof on a hill]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a building with a curved roof on a hill

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That`s awesome! It looks so calm in the pic - I hope you enjoy your experience and learn some new techniques!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's amazing how something so easy can make such a big difference to our health!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Yep, it's become part of my routine now. Can't imagine my life without it.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yeah, same! It helps me stay balanced during my studies.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad to hear it, Jolene. How's the project going?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's tough but I'm chugging along. Thanks!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: You're so strong for handling all the challenges. You've got this!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Your support really means a lot. I'll keep pushing forward.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: No worries, Jolene. I'm here if you need me. Take care of yourself and don't forget to rest up.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: What have you been doing lately?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I recently saw this wonderful sunrise again. [image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Glimpsing that calms me. Taking beach walks relaxes me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Did my photo remind you of something?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That shot was like a reminder of my last beach getaway. So chill and nice.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Glad it brought back good memories.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Maybe one day we will be able to watch the sunrise together!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: An offer I can't refuse!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Bye, Deb! See you later!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: See ya! Stay safe and catch you later. Bye!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hey Jolene, had a tough week. Storm forced us to cancel our yoga getaway.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Sorry to hear about it. How are you feeling now?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I was bummed about it, but I'm doing better now. It was just a setback, but I found comfort in my work and spending time at home. Reminds me to be grateful for the little things. And you? How's it going?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: My partner and I plan a camping trip to connect with nature and practice yoga.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It can be both good and tough to plan activities with a busy schedule - what strategies do you use?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Having a routine helps me stay on top of everything I need to do. I have a schedule for classes, studying, and personal time. Self-care activities like yoga and meditation help me stay balanced and relax.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'd love to learn more about how you do it.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I can tell you about it if you're interested. It took a bit of experimenting, but it's really helped me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds great! Let's set up a coffee date and talk about it!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Wanna meet up at that cafe next Monday? Let's try fresh pastries. [image: a photo of a coffee shop with a bunch of coffee machines]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a coffee shop with a bunch of coffee machines

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sounds good, Jolene! When did you have in mind? That cafe rocks.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: How about Wednesday at 4? Can't wait to catch up over coffee! [image: a photo of a person holding a cup of coffee in front of a bunch of flowers]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a cup of coffee in front of a bunch of flowers

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That pic looks so peaceful. Reminded me of a cool hidden coffee shop near me. Rate it! [image: a photo of a group of people sitting at tables in a room]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a group of people sitting at tables in a room

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Tell me more about it when we meet, maybe next time we’ll be there.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Sorry, I remembered that I already have plans for this day.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Now I'll see when it's more convenient for me.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Thank you for your understanding, I'm waiting.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: How about Friday at 5? I will need to sort out the books from this bookcase and I will be free. [image: a photo of a room with a book shelf and a ceiling fan]
turns.image_caption: a photo of a room with a book shelf and a ceiling fan

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Absolutely, let's do that! Can't wait for our coffee date next week. See you then. Stay safe!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: See ya soon, Deb! Be safe and I'm excited for our coffee date!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Maybe just grab me some interesting books!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Hey Deb! So sorry for the late reply, been super busy. Last weekend my partner and I traveled to a meditation retreat for a few weeks in Phuket. Amazing experience! Nature, reflection and a break from engineering studies were awesome - it helped me find inner peace.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I'd love to hear more about your reflections there and how they changed you.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: At the retreat, I had time to reflect on what makes me happy. It made me realize the importance of incorporating relaxation, self-care, and balance in life alongside my engineering studies. The beauty of nature there was so inspiring and refreshing!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Was there anything from the retreat that stood out to you?

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: The one session that really stood out was about releasing expectations and judgments and just savoring the present. It was a strong reminder to not just dwell on the finish line, but to appreciate the journey too. I usually get too consumed with hitting my goals that I forget to appreciate the ride.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: I've been thinking about this a lot, too. Life's full of small moments and being grateful for those can really boost our happiness.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Yup, totally agree! Sometimes we get too focused on the big stuff and don't appreciate all the tiny wins. Like the feeling of the sun or a great cup of coffee - can be small but they make life much better. Trying to be more mindful and grateful to take it all in now.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: That's great, Jolene! Practicing mindfulness and gratitude can really change our day-to-day. Even just a different outlook can make the little things in life joyful. Glad you're getting into it!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I'm experiencing a new level of joy and happiness!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: It's wonderful to see your progress, and I'm excited to be on this journey with you!

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Thanks, Deb! Appreciate your support. It's great that we can do this together.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Having a supportive community definitely helps. We can motivate and encourage each other! By the way, I recently played a game. I don't remember what it's called. This is a card game about cats, where you take cards one by one from a deck, and then you can attack your opponent with them. We'll definitely play it with you!
turns.image_caption: a photo of two children standing on yoga mats in a room

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: I look forward to meeting you and playing this game!

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Since speaking last, I reconnected with my mom's old friends. Their stories made me tear up and reminded me how lucky I am to have had her.
turns.image_caption: a photo of a living room with a couch and a fire place

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It's great that you could reconnect with them. Hearing stories about our loved ones can be tough but also comforting.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Hearing stories about my mom was emotional. It was both happy and sad to hear things I hadn't heard before. It was a mix of emotions, but overall it was comforting to reconnect with her friends.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness. Those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you.

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: Wow, it was so special. A glimpse into her life beyond what I knew. Through their eyes, I appreciate her more. Here I am and my mom. [image: a photo of two women in pajamas taking a selfie in a mirror]
turns.image_caption: a photo of two women in pajamas taking a selfie in a mirror

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: That looks like a blast! What did you and your mom's friends do on that day?

turns.speaker: Deborah
turns.text: We reminisced and looked through her photos. It was really sweet.

turns.speaker: Jolene
turns.text: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic! It's great that you could share that experience with friends. It's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love.

turns.speaker: Deborah
